	30
	Secret Library. You find a library of secret knowledge.
* Secret Weakness. Choose one Elite model in your Warband and one of the following: Imperial, Chaos, Xenos, Outlaw. For the remainder of the campaign, that model has +1 INJURY DICE with all attacks against models in the chosen type of Warband.
* Psychic Knowledge (requires PSYKER model). Choose one PSYKER model in your warband. Randomly select a Shared Psychic Power (roll a D6 for Discipline and a D6 for power), rerolling powers the chosen model already knows. The chosen model learns that power without paying for it, which does not count towards its normal limits or towards your credit limit for a mission.
* Knowledge for Tzeentch (Chaos Daemons Only). You earn 2 Glory. Add 4 to the Ascendancy of Tzeentch.
* Arcane Knowledge (Thousand Sons Only). You earn 5 additional Arcane Points.
* Prophecies (Aeldari Only). Reduce your current Threat to 0.
* Acquire (Leagues of Votann Only). You earn 100 Galactic Intel.
	36
	Webway Gate. You find a safe and stable gate, leading to somewhere else.
* Travel. Choose any other location you have not yet explored from any Exploration table and explore that location. You still earn credits based on your original roll.
	

Shared Patrons
Shared Patrons
Shared Imperial Patrons
Patron: Administratum Prefectus
Or a similar high ranking member of the Adeptus Administratum.
* Arrest Order. At the start of the battle, choose one enemy model. This model has +1 DICE to Hit and +1 INJURY DICE against that model during this battle with all attacks, and it can choose to gain +1 DICE to any Dash Success Roll, but if it does and succeeds, it must move in as close as possible to the chosen enemy as its movement allows.
* Legal Action. At the start of the battle, after deployment, select one enemy model. You can redeploy that model up to 6” in any direction you wish, though not into Melee combat, into impassable terrain, or out of the battlefield. You cannot choose a model that cannot be forced to move.
* Punishable Offense. Whenever an enemy successfully Charges this model, that enemy gains a BLOOD MARKER.
* Red Tape. Any enemy Charging this model can only use their base Movement characteristic and not add a D6 to their charge distance.
* Restraint Protocols. Enemies cannot Retreat from this model.
* Threat Response. Once during each Turn, when an enemy ends its movement within 8” of this model, this model may immediately make an attack with a ranged weapon that is not HEAVY against that enemy if otherwise able.
Patron: Ecclesiastic Cardinal
Or a similar high-ranking member of the Ecclesiarchy.
* Ardent Eradication. When this model causes a Down enemy to roll on the Injury chart with a ranged attack, you may set 1 Die to 6 and roll the rest as normal.
* Ecclesiastic Inspiration (Adepta Sororitas Warband Only, LIMIT: 1). At the start of each battle that this model participates in, you gain 1 Miracle.
* Fervent Brawl. This model is always considered to be equipped with a Close Combat Weapon if it has a free hand in melee, and its attacks with this weapon have +1 DICE and +1 INJURY DICE.
* Rally the Flock (Adeptus Ministorum Warband Only, LIMIT: 1). At the end of each battle that this model took part in, you gain D3+1 Flock points.
* Redeemed Through Fire. This model’s attacks with the FIRE Keyword have +1 INJURY DICE.
* Unwavering Devotion. Whenever this model rolls on the Elite Trauma Chart, you can roll twice and choose one of the results.
* Zealous Persecution. Whenever this model takes an enemy Out of Action, this model gains 1 BLESSING MARKER.
Patron: The Indomitus Crusade
Roboute Guilliman or one of the other leaders of the Crusade.
* Adaptive Tactics. Select any skill you want from the Wild Card Skills.
* Medical Talent. Once after each battle, when this model or another in your Warband rolls on the Elite Trauma Chart, or makes a casualty test, you can reroll. The second result stands.
* Organizational Talent. While this model is in your Warband, increase the LIMIT of one piece of battlekit you are allowed to take by 1. Each piece of battlekit can be chosen only once.
* Supply Shipment: Armour and Equipment (LIMIT: 1). The cost of any suit of armour or equipment worth 15 credits or more is reduced by 5 credits if the model with this skill is part of the Warband.
* Supply Shipment: Melee Weapons (LIMIT: 1). The cost of any melee weapon worth 10 credits or more is reduced by 5 credits if the model with this skill is part of the Warband.
* Supply Shipment: Ranged Weapons (LIMIT: 1). The cost of any ranged weapon worth 20 credits or more is reduced by 5 credits if the model with this skill is part of the Warband.
Patron: Lord Inquisitor
When you select this patron, choose either Puritan or Radical.
* Bound Entity (Radical Only). This model gains the DEEP STRIKE Keyword.
* Highly Placed Ally. This model gains the Set Dice Exploration Skill.
* Inquisitorial Honor (non-Inquisition Warband Only). At the end of each battle, you gain 1 Glory if this model participated.
* Master of Spies (Inquisition Warband Only). While this model is in your Warband, you can roll twice for your Shadow Operation at the start of each battle, choosing one result.
* Secret Forces. While this model is in your Warband, increase the LIMIT of one type of Troop you are allowed to take by 1. You cannot choose a model with a LIMIT of 1 or that has the LARGE Keyword, and each Troop type can be chosen only once.
* Trained by a Legend. This model gains the INFILTRATOR and STEALTH Keywords.
* Upholder of the Creed (Puritan Only). You have +1 DICE to Morale tests while this model is on the battlefield and not Down.
* Void Trader. This model gains the Lucky Exploration Skill.
Shared Chaos Patrons
Patron: Chaos Undivided
The concept of Chaos at large, or a Daemon Prince such as Be’lakor.
* Daemonic Whispers. As an Action with a Success Roll, this model can force any single enemy model with 24" that is touching any Cover, but not in Melee combat, to move 1", leaving the Cover. The chosen model is moved by your opponent, and cannot take the model into Melee combat or into contact with any other Cover.
* Diabolist (Psyker Only). This model’s psychic powers that cause Injuries (including attacks) have +1 DICE.
* Exalted Possession (non-Daemon Only). This model gains the DAEMON Keyword, its movement speed is increased by 2”, and all injury rolls made against it have -1 INJURY DICE, but it gains 1 BLOOD MARKER at the end of each of its Activations.
* Exalted Possessor (Daemon Only). As an Action with a Success Roll, this model can force any opponent within 1” of it to make one of its own Melee attacks against itself. You can choose which weapon it uses.
* Hate-Fuelled Demagogue. This model and each friendly model within 6” of it gain the CRITICAL Keyword on all attacks they make.
* Master Of The Union. As an Action with a Success Roll, this model can choose one other friendly DAEMON within 6” that it can see. If this model is a DAEMON, it must choose a model that does not share any of the following Keywords with it: KHORNE, NURGLE, SLAANESH, TZEENTCH, UNDIVIDED. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the chosen model. If a BLOOD MARKER is removed in this way, the chosen model gains a BLESSING MARKER.
* Profane Zeal. During an Activation in which it Charged, this model has +1 DICE to Hit and +1 INJURY DICE with melee attacks.
Patron: Chaos Warlord
Abbadon The Despoiler or another powerful Heretic Astartes warlord.
* Flames of Spite. As an Action with a Risky Success Roll, this model can pick a friendly model that is within 18” of it that it can see. Then draw a straight line 1mm wide between the closest points of the bases of the two models, and make an Injury Roll with the FIRE Keyword for each model (friend or foe) that is crossed or reached by the line, including the friendly model that you picked but not including this model.
* Lord of Terror. This model gains the FEAR Keyword.
* Merciless Overseer. Other friendly non-Elite, non-mercenary models within 3” of this model have +1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.
* Paragon Of Hatred. This model’s melee attacks gain the SWEEPING Keyword.
* Trusted War Leader (Leader Only). At the end of each battle, you earn an additional 1 Glory.
* Veteran Raider. Enemy models never get free attacks against this model when it Retreats, and this model can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.
Patron: Heretek Lord
Vashtor the Arkifane, the master of a Hell-Forge, or a similar master of dark technology.
* Architect Of Destruction. This model’s weapons with BLAST increase their BLAST radius by 1”.
* Bastion. This model has BLOCK. In addition, enemies that Charged during this Turn have -1 INJURY DICE against this model with all attacks, and cannot force this model to move.
* Daemonsmith. The first -1 Armour of each friendly VEHICLE model within 6” of this model has IMPERVIOUS.
* Implacable Taskmaster. The first time this model moves during each of its Activations, one friendly model within 6” of it can also move up to half of its own movement speed. This movement can bring that model out of or into close combat, treating it as a Retreat or Charge as appropriate.
* Siege Lord. If the target of any of this model’s ranged attack would have an armour modifier of -3, you may set one die of the injury roll to a 6 before the roll is made. The rest of the dice for the injury roll are rolled as normal.
* Unyielding Mettle. Up to the first -2 of this model’s armour has IMPERVIOUS.
Patron: Khorne
Or a powerful Khorne Daemon.
* Aspect Of Death. This model’s attacks have +1 DICE to Hit and +1 INJURY DICE against Down enemies.
* Brazen Hide. This model’s armour improves by -1, stacking up to -3.
* Devastating Blow. Whenever this model hits with a melee attack, the target also suffers a STUN MARKER.
* Glory Of Battle. This model’s movement speed increases by 2”.
* Immense Power. Injuries caused by this model’s melee attacks have +1 INJURY MODIFIER and cannot have -DICE applied to them.
* Rage Incarnate. When this model is taken Out of Action, before removing it from the table, it can make a single melee attack against an enemy it is in close combat with. BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on this attack's Success Roll.
Patron: Nurgle
Or a powerful Nurgle Daemon.
* Acidic Ichor. This model’s melee attacks gain ARMOUR PIERCING 1, stacking with other sources of ARMOUR PIERCING.
* Arch-Contaminator. As long as at least one INFECTION MARKER is spent, this model needs to spend 1 fewer BLOOD MARKERS/INFECTION MARKERS to cause a Bloodbath.
* Foul Effluents. Whenever an enemy model activates while within 1” of this model, that enemy suffers a BLOOD MARKER. A model with NEGATE GAS is not affected.
* Heaving Mass. This model gains the LARGE Keyword if it did not already have it, and whenever it successfully Charges one or more enemies, each of those enemies gains a BLOOD MARKER.
* Overflowing Fecundity. This model has REGENERATE 1.
* Plague Fly Hive. This model and each friendly NURGLE or CHAOS CULT model within 3” of it have the STEALTH Keyword.
Patron: Slaanesh
Or a powerful Slaanesh Daemon.
* Faultless Duellist. This model has VICIOUS 10 with all melee attacks it makes with non-PISTOL weapons.
* Glutton For Punishment. BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on this model’s attacks. In addition, while this model has 3 or more BLOOD MARKERS, it has +1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.
* Intoxicating Musk. Enemies within 1” of this model have -1 DICE to Hit with melee attacks. Models with NEGATE GAS are immune.
* Loathsome Grace. This model’s movement speed increases by 2”.
* The Murderdance. Immediately after this model Charges, it can make a single additional attack with one of its melee weapons.
* Unbound Arrogance. Whenever this model makes a melee attack, you and your opponent each secretly choose a number between 1 and 3, then simultaneously reveal your choices. If the numbers differ, this model has +DICE Equal to the number you chose to Hit with that attack. If they are the same, this model has -1 DICE to Hit instead.
Patron: Tzeentch
Or a powerful Tzeentch Daemon.
* Aetherstride. This model ignores Difficult and Dangerous Terrain, and does not suffer Injury rolls due to falling, nor does it fall Down due to failing a Diving Charge.
* Arrogance Of Aeons (Psyker Only). This model has +1 DICE to Deny the Witch, and can do so at a range of up to 18”.
* Fractal Mind (Psyker Only). This model can choose to use an additional psychic power before beginning to count how many powers it has used during its Activation. That power has PERILOUS ±1.
* Incorporeal Form. Injury rolls made against this model have an additional -1 INJURY DICE unless they have the FIRE, GAS, PSYCHIC, STUN MARKERS, or STUN Keyword.
* Lorekeeper Of Tzeentch (Psyker Only). The range of all of this model’s psychic powers is increased by 6”.
* Tyrant of the Warp (Psyker Only). This model does not suffer Perils of the Warp unless the power it is using has PERILOUS, but reduce the PERILOUS value by 1. (PERILOUS ±0 still allows it to suffer Perils of the Warp on a 2 or 12.)
Shared Outlaw Patrons
Patron: Pirate Lord
* The Boot. Enemy models within 1” of this model cannot stand up from Down.
* Pillager. This model gains the Re-roll Exploration Skill twice.
* Port Contacts. While this model is in your warband, you can increase your LIMIT for any weapon, armour, or equipment by 1. Each piece of battlekit can only be increased once in this way.
* Scar Collector. This model can suffer up to 2 additional Battle Scars before being killed.
* Walk the Plank. Enemy models within 3” of this model automatically fail all Success Rolls made to avoid falling when Downed, and suffer +1 DICE INJURY to the Injury roll caused by such a fall.
* Whale Hunter. When this model makes a Melee Attack Success Roll against a LARGE enemy, they roll 3d6 to hit instead of 2d6, totalling the sum, to Hit.
Shared Battlekit
Shared Battlekit
The Scope Capable property means the weapon can benefit from the Scope equipment.

All models within 3” of a Smoke marker have the COVER and STEALTH Keywords. Any effect that ignores the STEALTH Keyword also ignores this COVER Keyword. At the end of the Turn, roll a D6. On a 3 or lower, remove the Smoke marker. Otherwise, remove it at the end of the next Turn.

* Chain Fist. Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, HELD
* Eviscerator. Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, HEAVY, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, TWO-HANDED
* Heavy Plasma Blade. Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, TWO-HANDED
* Heavy Power Weapon. Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, TWO-HANDED
* Heavy Rock Drill. Melee, -1 DICE, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, IGNORE ARMOUR, HEAVY, RISKY, TWO-HANDED
* Heavy Rock Saw. Melee, -1 DICE, +1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, HEAVY, RISKY, TWO-HANDED
* Heavy Power Fist. Melee, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, HELD
* Shock Maul. Melee, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY, STUN, TWO-HANDED
* Thunder Hammer. Melee, +2 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED
* Two-Handed Blade. Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED
* Two-Handed Hammer. Melee, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED
Shared Armour
Shared Armour
* Standard Armour. -1 INJURY MODIFIER
* Heavy Armour. -2 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY. Due to its bulk, even a STRONG wearer rolls only a D3 for extra charge distance instead of a D6.
* Power Armour. -2 INJURY MODIFIER
* Terminator Armour. -3 INJURY MODIFIER. Model gains the DEEP STRIKE, STRONG, and VEHICLE Keywords, as well as LARGE if not already LARGE. It can wield a TWO-HANDED ranged weapon in one hand instead of a TWO-HANDED melee weapon due to its STRONG Keyword. Due to its bulk the wearer rolls only a D3 for extra charge distance instead of a D6. Terminator Armour cannot be combined with a Shield, nor used with a Jump Pack.
* Shield. -1 INJURY MODIFIER, HELD. A model can equip only one Shield.
* Heavy Shield. HELD, HEAVY, COVER. Counts as a Shield, including for Shield Combo.
Shared Equipment
Basic Shared Equipment
* Augury Scanner. Enemy models must be set up at least 16” away from this model when using the DEEP STRIKE or INFILTRATOR Keywords.
* Blade Venom (CONSUMABLE). Blades, Close Combat Weapons, Paired Blades, Throwing Knives, and Two-Handed Blades that the model is equipped with each gain the GAS Keyword for the duration of the battle.
* Camo Cloak. A model equipped with a Camo Cloak gains the STEALTH Keyword.
* Combat Helmet. The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL. Counts as Headgear.
* Cult Icon. HELD, ICON. As an Action with a Risky Success Roll, this model can give itself or another model within 6" a BLESSING MARKER.
* Filter Plugs. The model has NEGATE GAS.
* Chaos Sigil. The equipped model gains the FEAR Keyword.
* Grapnel Launcher. A model with this launcher adds +1 DICE to any Climb Success Roll rolls.
* Grav Chute. The equipped model does not suffer Injury rolls due to falling. It also has +1 DICE to Diving Charge Success Rolls and does not fall Down or suffer an Injury roll due to failing a Diving Charge.
* Holy Relic. This model starts each game with 1 BLESSING MARKER.
* Imperial Icon. HELD, ICON. As an Action with a Risky Success Roll, this model can give itself or another model within 6" a BLESSING MARKER.
* Iron Halo. Injury rolls made against this model have -1 INJURY DICE. Counts as Headgear.
* Jump Pack. The model gains FLYING and +2” movement speed, but cannot carry any HEAVY equipment or become mounted on any equipment.
* Medicae Kit. Models with a Medicae Kit can take a Risky Success Roll and choose themself or one ally within 1”. On a success, you can remove one BLOOD MARKER from the target, or if it is Down, you can instead allow it to stand up.
* Photo Goggles. The equipped model ignores the STEALTH Keyword when making ranged attacks. In addition, the range of its weapons cannot be reduced.
* Psychic Familiar. Once per battle, when the owner makes a PSYCHIC attack or takes a PSYCHIC Success Roll, it can add +1 DICE to that roll.
* Psychic Hood. Injury rolls with the PSYCHIC Keyword have -1 INJURY DICE against the wearer, and it has +1 DICE when Denying the Witch. Counts as Headgear.
* Purity Seal. When a model equipped with a Purity Seal fails a Risky Success Roll, that model may use this item. If it does, its Activation is not ended. Can be used once per battle.
* Rosarius. The wearer treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).
* Scope. Negates the penalty for Long Range if the model has not moved during this Activation. Only usable with weapons with the Scope Capable property.
* Servo-Medicae. Counts as a Medicae Kit, but the user gains +1 DICE on the Success Roll to use it.
* Shovel. A model equipped with a Shovel that is deployed on Open terrain has the COVER Keyword until it moves away from its starting position. In addition, a model equipped with a Shovel can use it as a 2-Handed Melee Weapon instead of using any other Melee Weapons it has.
* Vox Unit. HELD. Unless this model is Down, friendly models within 4” of it can add +1 DICE to their Dash Success Rolls.
Ammunition Equipment
* Dum-Dum Ammunition (CONSUMABLE). AMMUNITION (CRITICAL). Autogun, Autopistol, Stub Pistol, or Heavy Stubber only.
* Frag Ammunition (CONSUMABLE). AMMUNITION (BLAST 2”, SHRAPNEL, -1 INJURY DICE). Bolt Carbine, Boltgun, Bolt Rifle, Bolt Sniper Rifle, Assault Bolter, Bolt Pistol, or Heavy Bolt Pistol, or the Bolter or Bolt Pistol mode of a combined weapon only.
* Infernus Ammunition (CONSUMABLE). AMMUNITION (FIRE). Bolt Carbine, Boltgun, Bolt Rifle, Bolt Sniper Rifle, Assault Bolter, Bolt Pistol, or Heavy Bolt Pistol, or the Bolter or Bolt Pistol mode of a combined weapon only.
* Manstopper Ammunition (CONSUMABLE). AMMUNITION (+1 INJURY MODIFIER against any target that has no armour, including shields). Autogun, Autopistol, Stub Pistol, or Heavy Stubber only.
* Mortis Ammunition (CONSUMABLE). AMMUNITITION (GAS). Bolt Carbine, Boltgun, Bolt Rifle, Bolt Sniper Rifle, Assault Bolter, Bolt Pistol, or Heavy Bolt Pistol, or the Bolter or Bolt Pistol mode of a combined weapon only.
* Phosphor Ammunition (CONSUMABLE). AMMUNITION (IGNORE COVER). Autogun, Automatic Shotgun, Shotgun, Autopistol, Stub Pistol, or Heavy Stubber only.
* Radium Ammunition (CONSUMABLE). AMMUNITION (GAS). Autogun, Automatic Shotgun, Shotgun, Autopistol, Stub Pistol, or Heavy Stubber only.
* Seeker Ammunition (CONSUMABLE). AMMUNITION (IGNORE COVER). Bolt Carbine, Boltgun, Bolt Rifle, Bolt Sniper Rifle, Assault Bolter, Bolt Pistol, or Heavy Bolt Pistol, or the Bolter or Bolt Pistol mode of a combined weapon only.
* Shock Ammunition (CONSUMABLE). AMMUNITION (STUN). One Autogun, Automatic Shotgun, Shotgun, Autopistol, Stub Pistol, or Heavy Stubber only.
* Vengeance Ammunition (CONSUMABLE). AMMUNITION (ARMOUR PIERCING 1). Bolt Carbine, Boltgun, Bolt Rifle, Bolt Sniper Rifle, Assault Bolter, Bolt Pistol, or Heavy Bolt Pistol, or the Bolter or Bolt Pistol mode of a combined weapon only.
Cyberteknika Equipment
Cyberteknika cannot be removed or sold once given to a model. If the model suffers an injury of the type their Cyberteknika prevents, roll a D6. On a 1-3, the Cyberteknika is destroyed, but the injury (and Scar) is not sustained. An ELITE model can have up to 3 Cyberteknika. Other models can have up to 2 Cyberteknika.
* Cranial Cyberteknika. Critical Hits do not grant the normal +1 DICE against this model. The CRITICAL Keyword still functions normally. In addition, the model ignores the penalties of the following Traumas (but not the accompanying Scar) and cannot gain them: Dark Memory, Head Wound, Paranoia.
* Ocular Cyberteknika. The model ignores the penalty for shooting at Long Range. In addition, the model ignores the penalties of the following Traumas (but not the accompanying Scar) and cannot gain them: Insomniac, Lost an Eye.
* Sindexterous Cyberteknika. The model ignores the penalty for attack with its off-hand. In addition, the model ignores the penalties of the following Traumas (but not the accompanying Scar) and cannot gain them: Hand Wound, Lost Arm.
* Motive Cyberteknika. The model has +1 DICE to Climb, Jump, and Diving Charge Success Rolls, as well as Success Rolls to avoid falling off of raised terrain. In addition, the model ignores the penalties of the following Traumas (but not the accompanying Scar) and cannot gain them: Leg Wounded, Muscle Damage.
* Torsonic Cyberteknika. Injuries against the model are rolled with -1 DICE. In addition, the model ignores the penalties of the following Traumas (but not the accompanying Scar) and cannot gain them: Chest Wound.
* Vascular Cyberteknika. The model has +1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls. In addition, the model ignores the penalties of the following Traumas (but not the accompanying Scar) and cannot gain them: Severe Nerve Damage, Shell-Shocked.
Shared Psychic Powers
Shared Psychic Powers
Use the numbers to randomize powers when needed, or if you want to.
1. Biomancy Discipline
1. Bio Lightning (5 credits, Attack). 12”, +1 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC, RISKY
2. Endurance (5 credits, Effect). 6”, Self or One Ally, Immediate, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the chosen model.
3. Haemorrhage (3 Glory, Effect). -1 DICE, 12”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target suffers 3 BLOOD MARKERS. On a failure, the caster suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER.
4. Iron Arm (5 credits, Effect). No Range, Self, Next Activation, injury rolls against the caster have -1 INJURY MODIFIER, stacking with armour up to -3.
5. Life Leech (10 credits, Attack). 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY. If this attack causes any BLOOD MARKERS or takes the target Out of Action, remove one BLOOD MARKER from the attacker.
6. Warp Speed (5 credits, Effect). 12”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, the target has +2” movement speed.
 2. Divination Discipline
1. Foreboding (5 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, 6”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, whenever an enemy attempts to Charge the target, the target can make either a ranged attack before that Charge, or a melee attack afterwards, against the Charging model in either case.
2. Misfortune (5 credits, Effect). 12”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target gains D3 STUN MARKERS.
3. Perfect Timing (3 credits, Effect). 12”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, the target has IGNORE COVER and IGNORE LONG RANGE when making ranged attacks.
4. Precognition (5 credits, Effect). 6”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, all attacks against that model have -1 DICE to Hit.
5. Prescience (7 credits, Effect). 6”, Self or One Ally, Immediate, the target gains a BLESSING MARKER.
6. Scrier's Gaze (4 Glory, Effect). No Range, Self, Special, for the next D6+1 Activations this Turn, unless another model has already successfully used this power this Turn, you choose which model will activate next after each Activation, following the normal rules (turn order, etc.). If you choose a model in a Fireteam, the model's owner decides if it will activate as a Fireteam or individually. On a failure, this model instead must roll on the Injury chart, ignoring armour. This power cannot be used while within 1” of an enemy.
3. Pyromancy Discipline
1. Fiery Form (15 credits, Effect). No Range, Self, End of Turn, Injury rolls against the caster are made at -1 DICE and its melee weapons gain the FIRE Keyword.
2. Fire Shield (7 credits, Effect). 6”, Self or One Ally, Immediate and End of Turn, each enemy in close combat with the target immediately suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER, and each time an enemy enters close combat with the target and after each time an enemy attacks it in melee, that enemy suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER. An enemy with NEGATE FIRE is immune to this power.
3. Flame Breath (20 credits, Attack). 12”, AUTOMATIC 2, -1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE, PSYCHIC, RISKY
4. Molten Beam (3 Glory, Attack). 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE, PSYCHIC, RISKY. When shot, draw a straight 12” line that is 1mm wide from the attacker. On a hit, all models along that line are hit. On a miss, the attacker is hit instead.
5. Spontaneous Combustion (15 credits, Effect). 12”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target suffers 2 BLOOD MARKERS. A target with NEGATE FIRE is immune to this power.
6. Sunburst (10 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, 3”, Each Model Besides Self, Immediate, each target must roll on the Injury table. This injury is considered to have the FIRE and IGNORE ARMOUR Keywords. This power cannot be used while within 1” of an enemy.
4. Technomancy Discipline
1. Blessing of the Machine God (5 credits, Effect). 6”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, the target has +1 INJURY DICE with one weapon of your choice.
2. Fury of Medusa (2 Glory, Attack). 24”, BLAST 5”, PSYCHIC, RISKY. On a miss, the caster falls Down.
3. Machine Flense (5 credits, Attack). 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, -1 INJURY DICE against non-ARTIFICIAL, non-VEHICLE models, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN
4. Objuration Mechanicum (15 credits, Effect). 8”, One Enemy, Immediate, choose one ranged weapon carried by the target. The target must make an attack with it against itself, but it does not add its Ranged skill to that attack if it is positive. This power cannot be used while in close combat.
5. Psysteel Armour (10 credits, Effect). 12”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, choose one Armour battlekit (but not a shield) carried by the target. That Armour’s penalty to Injury rolls improves by -1, stacking to a maximum of -3.
6. Reforge (7 credits, Effect). 6”, Self or One Ally, immediate, if the target has the ARTIFICIAL, MECHANICUS, or VEHICLE Keyword, or is a model with at least -2 worth of Armour (besides shields), remove D3 BLOOD MARKERS from it.
5. Telekinesis Discipline
1. Assail (10 credits, Attack). 12”, ASSAULT, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, PSYCHIC, SHRAPNEL, RISKY
2. Crush (15 credits, Attack). 24”, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY
3. Gate of Infinity (15 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, 24”, Point, Immediate, choose a location that is not on or entirely surrounded by Impassable Terrain. Remove the caster from the battlefield and place it back on the battlefield at that point.
4. Shockwave (10 credits, Effect). 6”, Each Model Besides Self, Immediate, each target must roll on the Injury table, with +1 INJURY DICE. This injury has IGNORE ARMOUR, NONLETHAL, and STUN MARKERS. The targets are then each pushed D3” directly away from the caster unless they are LARGE.
5. Telekine Dome (7 credits, Effect). No Range, Self, End of Turn, Injury rolls against the caster and each ally within 3” of it have -1 DICE.
6. Vortex of Doom (2 Glory, Attack). 6”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE ARMOUR, RELOAD, BLAST 5”, PSYCHIC, RISKY, SCATTER
6. Telepathy Discipline
1. Hallucination (2 Glory, Effect). 8”, One Enemy, Immediate, choose one weapon carried by the target. The target must make an attack with the chosen weapon against the target of your choice (it must be a legal target for the attack). On a failure, the target can instead make an attack with any one of its weapons against any target of its choice. This power cannot be used while in close combat.
2. Invisibility (10 credits, Effect). No Range, Self, Special, if any piece of scenery the caster is touching can block line of sight in any direction, even partially, regardless of whether an enemy currently has a clear line of sight, then enemies cannot target the caster with ranged attacks or Charges. Weapons with the Keyword BLAST affect it as normal if it is in the radius of the weapon. This effect ends if this caster moves from its exact position in any way, it makes a Ranged Attack, or an enemy model comes within 1.5” of it.
3. Mental Fortitude (3 credits, Effect). No Range, No Targets, End of Turn, you have +1 DICE to your Morale Test at the end of this Turn, if any.
4. Psychic Shriek (5 credits, Attack). Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN
5. Puppet Master (10 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, 12”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target must move D6” in the direction of your choice. This movement allows free attacks as if it were a Retreat Action. This power cannot be used while in close combat.
6. Terrify (5 credits, Effect). Melee, One Enemy, Immediate, the target must move D6” directly away from the caster. This movement can bring the target into or out of melee, and counts as a Charge and/or Retreat as appropriate. A model that ignores the FEAR Keyword is immune.
Imperial Factions
Imperial Factions
Adepta Sororitas
Adepta Sororitas
  Adepta Sororitas Special Rules
Miracles. You have a pool of Miracles, beginning at 0 at the start of each battle.


You gain Miracles in the following circumstances:
* Slay. Whenever one of your SORORITAS models takes an Elite enemy model Out of Action, you gain 1 Miracle.
* Martyr. Whenever one of your Elite SORORITAS models is taken Out of Action, you gain 1 Miracle.
* Hold. Whenever you succeed at a Morale test, you gain 1 Miracle.


You can spend Miracles as if they were BLESSING MARKERS on any of your SORORITAS models.


Sacred Martyrdom. Whenever one of your Elite models is killed for any reason, such as receiving a third Battle Scar, you earn 1 Glory. You earn an additional 1 Glory if the model had 10 or more XP, as well as an additional 1 Glory if it was a Saint Potentia.


Saint Potentia. During a campaign, when you create your warband, choose one Elite model to be your Saint Potentia. At the start of each battle, you may choose a Trial your Saint Potentia has not completed. The Saint Potentia completes its Trial once it satisfies the listed Requirements of that Trial during battles in which that Trial was chosen, at which point it permanently gains the listed Reward for that Trial. The requirements do not need to be satisfied during the same battle, and can be completed in any order.


In the event that your Saint Potentia completes all five Trials, it becomes a Living Saint (it remains your Saint Potentia). Remove all Traumas and Battle Scars from it. It no longer rolls on the Elite Trauma Table after a battle where it was taken Out of Action. In addition, all Injury rolls made against it have -1 DICE.


If your Saint Potentia leaves your Warband for any reason, choose a different Elite model to become your new Saint Potentia during your next Reinforcements Step. You can choose a newly recruited model.
Trial of Faith
Requirements
* Beacon of Divine Grace. Spend at least 3 Miracles on this model’s Success Rolls and/or Injury rolls made against it.
* Miraculous Feat. End two battles with 4 or more Miracles remaining.


Reward
* Boundless Faith. The first time you gain a Miracle during each battle, the Saint also gains a BLESSING MARKER.
Trial of Purity
Requirements
* Consecrate Ground. This model ends two separate battles within 6” of the center of the battlefield.
* Divine Will. Succeed on a Morale Test, or have your opponent fail one, while this model is on the battlefield and not Down.


Reward
* Blazing Soulfire. When the Saint hits an enemy with a melee attack, you can discard a Miracle to add +1 INJURY DICE and FIRE to the Injury roll.
Trial of Righteousness
Requirements
* Slay the Demagogue. This model takes an enemy Elite model Out of Action during two separate battles.
* Smite the Unbelievers. This model takes at least 3 enemy models Out of Action during one battle.


Reward
* Righteous Judgement. When the Saint makes a ranged attack, you can discard one Miracle to add IGNORE COVER and IGNORE LONG RANGE with that attack, and if it is a Critical Hit, it gains ARMOUR PIERCING 1, stacking with other sources of ARMOUR PIERCING.
Trial of Suffering
Requirements
* Martyr's Wounds. Be taken Out of Action during two separate battles.
* Scars of the Penitent. Suffer a Battle Scar.


Reward
* Miraculous Recovery. At the start of each of the Saint’s Activation, you can discard one Miracle in order to remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the Saint. If a BLOOD MARKER is removed in this way, the Saint gains a BLESSING MARKER.
Trial of Valor
Requirements
* Holy Crusader. This model ends a battle in your opponent’s deployment zone.
* Pious Reputation. This model performs a Glorious Deed during two separate battles.


Reward
* Voice of the Emperor. When your opponent takes a Morale Test, you can discard one Miracle in order to give that roll -1 DICE.
________________


Adepta Sororitas Patrons
Your patron can be an Abbess Sanctorum, or the Ecclesiastic Cardinal or Lord Inquisitor Shared Patron.
Patron: Abbess Sanctorum
Or a similar high ranking member of the Adepta Sororitas.
* Beacon Of Faith. At the start of this model’s Activation, you can spend 1 Miracle in order to remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from this model. If a BLOOD MARKER is removed in this way, give this model a BLESSING MARKER.
* Executioner Of Heretics. Whenever this model takes an enemy model Out of Action with a Bloodbath, you gain 1 Miracle, in addition to any you would normally earn.
* Indomitable Belief. This model cannot be forced to move and never falls when Downed within 1” of a cliff.
* Inspiring Orator. Whenever you spend a Miracle on a Success Roll for this model or an ally within 3” of it, you can set one die’s value to 6 before rolling instead of rolling it.
* Pure Of Will. This model can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 2. If it is already a PSYKER, it instead has +1 DICE when Denying the Witch.
* Righteous Rage. This model can spend BLESSING MARKERS (including Miracles) on Injury rolls they cause to enemy models as if they were BLOOD MARKERS on that enemy.

Adepta Sororitas Unique Battlekit
Adepta Sororitas Ranged Weapons
* Twin Grenade Launcher. 24”, +1 DICE, IGNORE COVER, BLAST 2”, SHRAPNEL, takes no hands
* Twin Storm Bolter. 24”, AUTOMATIC 2, +1 DICE, ASSAULT, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, HEAVY, takes no hands
Adepta Sororitas Melee Weapons
* Brazier of Holy Fire. HELD, FIRE, +1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword
   * Strike: Melee, MAIN HAND ONLY
   * Unleash: 8”, -1 INJURY DICE, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR. This attack can be made only once per battle.
* Neural Whip. Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR on Critical Hit, CRITICAL, STUN, WHIP 3”
* Null Rod. Melee, +1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword. The carrier gains FEAR and can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 1.
* Power Halberd. Melee, BLOCK, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, TWO-HANDED, Shield Combo
* Spear of the Faithful. Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, BLOCK, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, TWO-HANDED, Shield Combo
* Virge of Admonition. Melee, STUN, TWO-HANDED. Enemies within 8” of the wielder have -1 DICE to Dash Success Rolls.
Adepta Sororitas Armour
* Sacresant Shield. -1 INJURY MODIFIER, HELD, counts as a Shield, including for Shield Combo. Comes with a built-in weapon, which occupies the same hand as the shield.
   * Bolt Pistol: 9”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, PISTOL
Adepta Sororitas Equipment
* Armourium Cherub. Once per battle, the equipped model can gain +1 DICE to Hit with ranged attacks it makes during one of its Activations.
* Blessed Ammunition (CONSUMABLE). AMMUNITION (IGNORE LONG RANGE). Bolt Carbine, Bolter, Bolt Rifle, Bolt Sniper Rifle, Assault Bolter, Bolt Pistol, or Heavy Bolt Pistol, or the Bolter or Bolt Pistol mode of a combined weapon only.
* Incensor Cherub. Once per battle, when this model spends a Miracle, you gain 1 Miracle.
* Phial of Dolan (CONSUMABLE). Once during the battle, the equipped model can consume this phial to gain +1 DICE to Hit and +1 INJURY DICE with melee attacks during its Activation. It also has NEGATE FEAR during that Activation.
* Simulacrum Imperialis. HELD. While the carrier is on the battlefield and not Down, Injury rolls against the carrier and allies within 4” of it have -1 DICE.
Adepta Sororitas Campaign Shop
During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.
* Beneficence Chainsword (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Melee Weapon). Melee, CLEAVE 2, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, MAIN HAND ONLY
* Casket of Penance (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Penitent Host Only, Equipment). As an Action with no Success Roll, the carrier can rebuke its foes. The equipped model and each enemy within 6” of it each gain a BLOOD MARKER.
* Holy Judgement (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Dogmata Only, cannot be sold, Equipment). As an Action with a Risky Success Roll, this model can select any enemy model within 12” that it can see. If successful, the enemy model suffers one BLOOD MARKER.
* Litanies of Faith (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Equipment). Whenever this model or an ally within 6” of it spends one or more BLESSING MARKERS on a Success Roll (including Miracles), it counts as having spent 1 additional BLESSING MARKER.
* Quicksilver Veil (1 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Equipment). Once during each battle, you can add 3” to the equipped model’s movement speed for the duration of its Activation.
* Relic Paragon Warsuit (8 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Armour). The equipped model is mounted in a paragon warsuit, and can take Paragon Warsuit Only battlekit. The rider gains the LARGE, STRONG, and VEHICLE Keywords, gains a movement speed of 8” and an Armour of -3, and counts as being equipped with a Close Combat Weapon. The warsuit counts as Power Armor for the purpose of models that must be equipped with Power Armor.


The equipped model can further be equipped with a single two-handed melee weapon, as well as a single two-handed ranged weapon. It can also be equipped with either Twin Grenade Launchers or Twin Storm Bolters, so long as it already has another ranged weapon. These additional weapons cannot be used at the same time as another ranged attack. Each of these weapons must be purchased separately. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons or armour, but can be equipped with any equipment from the Adepta Sororitas Armour besides a Grapnel Launcher, Jump Pack, Medicae Kit, or HELD battlekit.
* Saint’s Pulpit (7 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Canoness Only, Equipment). The equipped model is mounted on a floating pulpit. The rider gains the LARGE and VEHICLE Keywords, is always treated as being 3” above its current location, gains a movement speed of 8” and FLYING, has the COVER Keyword, and has the Weapon Mount ability. Cannot be combined with a Relic Paragon Warsuit.
   * Weapon Mount. The equipped model can ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one ranged weapon it wields.
* Sorrowsong (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Ranged Weapon). 18”, PISTOL, Scope Capable
   * Normal Shot: ARMOUR PIERCING 1
   * Overload: +2 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, RISKY, DANGEROUS
* Tears of Saint Celestine (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Equipment). As an Action with a Success Roll with +1 DICE, the equipped model can attempt to heal itself or one friendly non-ARTIFICIAL model within 6” of it. If it succeeds, remove D3 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success. You can choose to instead remove 3 BLOOD MARKERS if you spend 1 Miracle. You must choose before rolling the D3 on a Critical Success.
* Tears of the Emperor (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Ranged Weapon). 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 3”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, IGNORE ARMOUR, THROWN, FUMBLE, +1 INJURY DICE against models with the DAEMON Keyword.
Adepta Sororitas Elites
1 Canoness (Cost: 75 Credits +40 for armour)
Name
	Movement
	Ranged
	Melee
	Armour
	Base
	Canoness
	6”/Infantry
	+2
	+2
	-2
	32mm
	

Battlekit
The Canoness must be equipped with Power Armour, included in the cost and its statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adepta Sororitas Armoury.


Abilities
* Acts of Faith. The first time during each Turn that the Canoness takes an enemy model Out of Action, you gain 1 Miracle, in addition to any others you would gain.
* The Emperor’s Grace. Once per battle, when the Canoness is taken Out of Action for any reason, treat the result as No Effect instead.
* The Passion. Other friendly SORORITAS models within 6” of the Canoness have +1 DICE to Hit with melee attacks.


Keywords
ELITE, LEADER, SORORITAS
0-1 Dogmata (Cost: 65 Credits +40 for armour)

	32mm
	

Battlekit
The Dogmata must be equipped with Power Armour, included in the cost and its statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adepta Sororitas Armoury.


Abilities
* Hand of the Emperor. As an Action with a Risky Success Roll, the Dogmata can pray for divine intervention. On a success, you gain 1 Miracle.
* Unflinching Determination. Each other friendly model within 6” of the Dogmata has the NEGATE FEAR Keyword. If the model already has NEGATE FEAR or FEAR, it instead has +1 DICE to Hit with melee attacks against targets with the FEAR Keyword.


Keywords
ELITE, FEAR, SORORITAS

Battlekit
The Palatine must be equipped with Power Armour, included in the cost and its statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adepta Sororitas Armoury.


Abilities
* Fury of the Righteous. The Palatine and allies within 6” of it have VICIOUS 11 with all attacks, or VICIOUS 10 if that attack already has VICIOUS 11.
* Rapturous Blows. When the Palatine hits with a melee attack, you can spend 1 Miracle. If you do, roll +1 INJURY DICE for the Injury roll of that attack, and it causes an additional BLOOD MARKER, even if the attack had no other effect.


Keywords
ELITE, SORORITAS
Adepta Sororitas Troops
Novitiate (Cost: 35 Credits)
Name
	Movement
	Ranged
	Melee
	Armour
	Base
	Novitiate
	6”/Infantry
	+0
	+0
	0
	25-28mm
	

Battlekit
A Novitiate can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adepta Sororitas Armoury.


Abilities
* Impetuous Fervor. When a Novitiate charges, roll 2D6 instead of 1D6 and then add the highest of the two dice to their charge move.
* Novice. After a Novitiate has participated in at least two missions, or if it scores a Glorious Deed or takes an enemy Elite model Out of Action, you can upgrade it to a Battle Sister at the end of a battle. You can immediately pay to give it any upgrades available to a Battle Sister, and it keeps its Impetuous Fervor ability. These upgrades count towards the normal limits. You must then equip it with Power Armour before it can participate in any further missions. It uses its new cost when calculating how many credits worth of models you can bring on a mission.


Keywords
LIMITED POTENTIAL, SORORITAS
Battle Sister (Cost: 35 Credits +40 for armour)
Name
	Movement
	Ranged
	Melee
	Armour
	Base
	Battle Sister
	6”/Infantry
	+1
	+0
	-2
	32mm
	

Battlekit
A Battle Sister must be equipped with Power Armour, included in the cost and its statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adepta Sororitas Armoury.


Abilities
* Penitence of Cowardice. At the end of a battle, if you failed a Morale test during that battle, up to 2 Battle Sisters that were not taken Out of Action can be “demoted” to Repentia, so long as you do not surpass any limits. Such a model loses any Battle Sister upgrades it has until it becomes a Battle Sister again via its Repentance ability, at which point it gains its upgrades back unless they would surpass the limits of those upgrades. It uses its new cost when calculating how many credits worth of models you can bring on a mission. Its Power Armour cannot be sold or equipped until it becomes a Battle Sister again or it is removed from your roster. If it was Elite, it remains Elite and earns XP normally.


Upgrades
When recruited, a Battle Sister can be given one of the following upgrades.
* Mortisanctus. Up to 1 Battle Sister can be upgraded to a Mortisanctus for +5 credits, granting it +1 Melee Skill and allowing it to ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one melee weapon it wields (though not the TWO-HANDED Keyword), but it has -1 to its Ranged Skill (for a total of +0).
* Retributor. Up to 2 Battle Sisters, or 3 in a Warband of 1,200 credits or more, can be upgraded to Retributors for +5 credits each, allowing them to ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one ranged weapon they carry.
* Sacresant. Up to 2 Battle Sisters, or 3 in a Warband of 1,200 credits or more, can be upgraded to Sacresants for +10 credits each, granting them +1 Melee Skill and the following ability:
   * Bodyguard. If any ally within 1” of the Sacresant is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Sacresant instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Sacresant.
* Seraphim. Up to 2 Battle Sisters can be upgraded to Seraphim for +15 credits each, allowing them to be equipped with Jump Packs (purchased separately). While equipped with a Jump Pack, a Seraphim has the SKIRMISHER Keyword, and while armed with Ranged Weapons with the PISTOL Keyword in addition to a Jump Pack, it has the following benefits:
   * If it is equipped with 2 Weapons with the PISTOL Keyword, it can take a Shoot ACTION with one and then immediately take a Shoot ACTION with the other.
   * Add the IGNORE OFF-HAND WEAPON Keyword to any weapons that have the PISTOL Keyword.
* Zephyrim. Up to 2 Battle Sisters can be upgraded to Zephyrim for +10 credits each, allowing them to be equipped with Jump Packs and Power Weapons (purchased separately). While equipped with a Jump Pack, a Zephyrim has the SKIRMISHER Keyword and +1 Melee Skill.


Keywords
SORORITAS
0-4 Repentia (Cost: 60 Credits)
Name
	Movement
	Ranged
	Melee
	Armour
	Base
	Repentia
	8”/Infantry
	N/A
	+1
	0
	25-28mm
	

Battlekit
A Repentia can be equipped with any melee weapons from the Adepta Sororitas Battlekit List, and it must be equipped with at least one weapon. It cannot be equipped with any armour or equipment from the Adepta Sororitas Armoury.


Abilities
* Armour of Faith. Injury rolls made against the Repentia have -1 INJURY DICE.
* Penitent Frenzy. The Repentia can ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one melee weapon it carries (but still must use two hands for a TWO-HANDED weapon).
* Repentance. At the end of any battle, if the Repentia scored a Glorious Deed or took an enemy ELITE model Out of Action, you can “upgrade” the Repentia to a Battle Sister by either paying 20 Credits to give it new Power Armour, or by giving it an available suit of Power Armour from your armoury (including its old armour if it was previously “demoted”). If you do, it is considered the same model for purposes of the post-game sequence, and it permanently gains the NEGATE FEAR Keyword in place of its Penitence of Cowardice ability. You can purchase an upgrade for it as if it was just recruited if it does not already have one. It is eligible for promotion immediately.
* Unfettered Movement. The Repentia has +1 DICE to all Climb, Dash, Jump, and Diving Charge Success Rolls.


Keywords
NEGATE FEAR, NO PROMOTION, SORORITAS
0-2 Paragon Warsuit (Cost: 110 Credits)
You may include 0-3 Paragon Warsuits in a Warband worth 1200 credits or more.
Name
	Movement
	Ranged
	Melee
	Armour
	Base
	Paragon Warsuit
	8”/Infantry
	+1
	+1
	-3
	50mm
	

Battlekit
The Paragon Warsuit is equipped with heavy armour plating and a Close Combat Weapon, included in its cost and statistics above. It can additionally be equipped with a single two-handed melee weapon, as well as a single two-handed ranged weapon. It can also be equipped with either Twin Grenade Launchers or Twin Storm Bolters, so long as it already has another ranged weapon. These additional weapons cannot be used at the same time as another ranged weapon. Each of these weapons must be purchased separately. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons or armour, but can be equipped with any equipment from the Adepta Sororitas Armoury besides a Grapnel Launcher, Medicae Kit, or HELD battlekit.


Keywords
LARGE, SORORITAS, STRONG, VEHICLE
0-1 Penitent Engine (Cost: 150 Credits)
Name
	Movement
	Ranged
	Melee
	Armour
	Base
	Penitent Engine
	6”/Infantry
	+1
	+1
	-2
	50mm
	

Battlekit
The Penitent Engine is equipped with your choice of two Penitent Buzz-Blades, two Penitent Flails, or one of each, included in its cost. Once chosen, these melee weapons cannot be changed. It is also fitted with heavy armour plating that grants it -2 armour, included in its cost and statistics above, and it can be equipped with a single ranged weapon, which must be purchased separately. It cannot use any other weapons, armour, or equipment.
* Penitent Buzz-Blade. Melee, HEAVY, IGNORE ARMOUR, RISKY
* Penitent Flail. Melee, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY


Abilities
* Endless Suffering. The Penitent Engine has +1 DICE when making a Dash Success Roll.
* Pay Penance. When the Penitent Engine is taken Out of Action, or its TOUGH Keyword prevents it from being taken Out of Action, you can give 1 BLESSING MARKER to one other friendly SORORITAS model.


Upgrades
* Mortifier. For an additional +10 credits, the Penitent Engine can be upgraded to a Mortifier. When a Mortifier is taken Out of Action by a melee attack, it can make a single melee attack against the attacker before it is removed from the battlefield. BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on the attack’s Success Roll.


Keywords
FEAR, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, SORORITAS, STRONG, TOUGH, VEHICLE

Warband Variant: Army of Faith  
* The Faithful. You cannot take any Penitent Engines, and only up to 2 Repentia.
* Angelic Descent. You can upgrade only up to 1 Battle Sister to a Retributor and up to 1 to a Sacresant, but you can upgrade up to 3 Battle Sisters to Seraphim and up to 3 to Zephyrim.
* Blinding Radiance. When an attack is made against one of your models with a Jump Pack or one of its allies within 3”, you can spend 1 Miracle to cause that attack to suffer -1 DICE to Hit. Further ranged attacks made during this Turn against the model with the Jump Pack or one of its allies with 3” of it have -1 DICE.
* Shield of Faith. Whenever you spend a Miracle on an Injury roll made against one of your SORORITAS models, that model gains an additional -1 INJURY MODIFIER, to a maximum of -3, during that Injury roll.
________________
Warband Variant: Hallowed Martyrs
* Holy Charge. You cannot upgrade any Battle Sisters to Retributors or Seraphim, and you can recruit only up to 1 Paragon Warsuit, but you can upgrade an additional Battle Sister to a Sacresant and an additional one to a Zephyrim.  
* Blood of Martyrs. You earn 1 Miracle each time one of your non-Elite SORORITAS models is taken Out of Action, but you do not earn any Miracles for taking an enemy Elite model Out of Action, and you cannot spend Miracles on Injury rolls made against your models.
* Spirit of the Martyr. When one of your SORORITAS models would be taken Out of Action, you can spend 1 Miracle to allow it to make a single melee attack before being removed from the battlefield. BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on this attack.
* Divine Intervention. When one of your ELITE SORORITAS models is taken Out of Action, you can spend 3 Miracles to treat it as a Down result instead. You can do this only once during each battle, and not if you already used Spirit of the Martyr for this Out of Action.
________________


Warband Variant: Penitent Host  
   * Repentia Superior. Instead of its The Passion ability, your Canoness has the following ability:
   * Overseer of Redemption. Each Repentia within 3” of the Canoness has +1 DICE to Hit with all melee attacks.
   * Penitents. You can recruit any number of Repentia and up to 2 Penitent Engines, and you can recruit up to 5 Arco-Flagellant Mercenaries for 70 credits each. You cannot recruit any Novitiates or Paragon Warsuits, and you can recruit Battle Sisters only via your Repentias’ Repentance ability. In a one-off game, you can recruit up to 1 Battle Sister.
   * Vows of Atonement. Instead of the Miracles special rule, at the start of each Turn, choose one of the following benefits to apply until the end of that Turn:
   * Absolution in Battle. Your Repentia, Arco-Flagellants, and Penitent Engines have +1 INJURY DICE with melee attacks made during an Activation in which they Charged.
   * Death Before Disgrace. When one of your Repentia, Arco-Flagellants, or Penitent Engines is taken Out of Action, before removing it from the table, it can make a single melee attack against an enemy it is in close combat with. BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on this attack's Success Roll. Your Mortifiers instead have +1 DICE to Hit and +1 INJURY DICE with their attack granted before being taken Out of Action.
   * The Path of the Penitent. Your Repentia, Arco-Flagellants, and Penitent Engines have +1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.
   * Penitent Flock. Instead of the Sacred Martyrdom and Saint Potentia special rules, you have the Rally the Flock special rule of the Adeptus Ministorum Faction. Your Canoness, Dogmata, and Palatine models gain the ORATOR Keyword.
*Adeptus Arbites
Adeptus Arbites
Adeptus Arbites can be played using the Palanite Enforcers Necromunda Gang. While different in-universe, that gang has been given all the appropriate options for Arbites.
Adeptus Astartes
Adeptus Astartes
  

Adeptus Astartes Special Rules
And They Shall Know No Fear. Your ASTARTES models have NEGATE FEAR.


The Rubicon Primaris. Any of your non-mercenary ASTARTES models besides a Dreadnought can take the following upgrade for a cost of +5 credits, even after they are recruited:
   * Primaris. The model gains +1” movement speed.


In addition, during a campaign, whenever a non-mercenary non-VEHICLE ASTARTES model without the Primaris upgrade is a casualty, or it suffers a Battle Scar, you can immediately attempt to save it by paying 5 credits to upgrade it to Primaris. If you do, roll a D6.
   * On a 4+, the model is upgraded to Primaris and is not considered a casualty, or no Battle Scar is suffered (and no accompanying Trauma).
   * On a 1-3, the model is still a casualty or suffers a Battle Scar as normal. If the Battle Scar does not kill the model, it is still upgraded to Primaris.


Gene Seeds. During a campaign, when one of your ASTARTES models becomes a casualty, you can attempt to recover its Gene Seed. Roll 1D6. On a 4+, or a 3+ if you have an Apothecary in your Warband, add a Gene Seed to your reserves. You can expend a single Gene Seed when you recruit an ASTARTES model to reduce the cost to recruit it by 30 credits.
Adeptus Astartes Patrons
Your patron can be a Chapter Master or The Indomitus Crusade Shared Patron.
Patron: Chapter Master
Or a similar high ranking member of the Adeptus Astartes.
   * Champion Of Humanity. This model has +1 DICE to Hit and +1 INJURY DICE with melee attacks against Elite enemies, but must attack an Elite target when making a melee attack if possible.
   * The Imperium’s Sword. Select any skill you want from the Melee & Strength Skills.
   * Storm Of Fire. Select any skill you want from the Ranged Skills.
No Warband Variant Only:
   * Adept Of The Codex (LIMIT: 1). While this model is on the Battlefield and not Down, you cannot fail Morale tests.
   * Master Of Strategy (LIMIT: 1). After you activate this model, you decide the next 3 models to activate, following the normal limits (i.e. the second will usually be your own model again). If you choose a model in a Fireteam, the model's owner decides if it will activate as a Fireteam or individually.
   * Warden of The Imperium. When an enemy ends its movement within 6” of this model, this model can immediately make a single ranged attack against that enemy if it is otherwise able to do so.
Black Templars Only:
   * Epitome Of Piety. This model can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 2. If it is already a PSYKER, it instead has +1 DICE when Denying the Witch.
   * Oathkeeper. If any ally within 1” of this model is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to this model instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit this model.
   * Paragon Of Fury. During an Activation in which it Charged, this model has +1 DICE to Hit and +1 INJURY DICE with melee attacks.
Blood Angels Only:
   * Gift Of Foresight. Once during each battle, you can reroll one Success Roll this model makes, or an injury roll made against it.
   * Heroic Bearing. This model’s Actions, Abilities, Skills, and psychic powers can treat its allies as if they were 6” closer than they are.
   * Soulwarden. The first -1 of armour of this model and each friendly ASTARTES model within 3” of it have IMPERVIOUS.
Dark Angels Only:
   * Honour Of The First Legion. Whenever an enemy model ends its movement within 6” of this model, this model can immediately Charge that enemy.
   * Calibanite Knight. This model has VICIOUS 10 with all melee attacks it makes with non-PISTOL weapons.
   * Stubborn Tenacity. When this model would be taken Out of Action, you can instead treat the result as a Down result. If you do, it is automatically taken Out of Action at the end of the current Turn.
Deathwatch Only
   * Castellan Of The Black Vault. When you choose this skill, you can purchase any battlekit from your Campaign Shop, with its cost reduced by 2 Glory, but any battlekit purchased in this way can be equipped only by this model.
   * Nowhere To Hide. This model’s ranged attacks ignores the STEALTH Keyword, and it can declare a Charge against an enemy it cannot see.
   * The Ties That Bind (LIMIT: 1). This model may form a FIRETEAM with any one non-ELITE model in your Warband. In addition, the first time one of the models fails a Risky Success Roll during a Fireteam Activation, the Activation does not end.
Grey Knights Only:
   * First To The Fray. At the start of each battle, after deployment, this model can move up to 6”.
   * Psychic Epitome. This model has +1 DICE to Hit with all attacks that have the PSYCHIC Keyword.
   * Unyielding Anvil. This model cannot be forced to move.
Imperial Fists Only:
   * Architect Of War. This model has the COVER Keyword, and the first -1 of its armour has IMPERVIOUS.
   * Hand Of Dorn. At the start of each battle, this model gains D3 BLESSING MARKERS.
   * Siege Master. If the target of any of this model’s ranged attack would have an armour modifier of -3 or higher, you may set one die of the injury roll to a 6 before the roll is made. The rest of the dice for the injury roll are rolled as normal.
Iron Hands Only:
   * Adept Of The Omnissiah. As an Action with a Success Roll, this model can attempt to repair itself or a friendly MECHANICUS, ARTIFICIAL, or VEHICLE model within 6” of it. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model. If this model is a Techmarine, instead its Blessing of the Omnissiah Ability removes D3 BLOOD MARKERS instead of 1.
   * Merciless Logic. This model has +1 DICE to Hit and +1 INJURY DICE against enemies that are Down.
   * Student Of History. After this model takes an enemy model Out of Action or knocks it Down, this model can move up to half its movement speed. This movement can allow this model to enter melee combat, but it provides free attacks as if it Retreated if it was in close combat already, except from the enemy that triggered this effect.
Legion of the Damned Only:
   * All-Consuming Flames. This model’s melee attacks gain FIRE.
   * Ethereal Approach. When this model is deployed, normally or via INFILTRATOR or DEEP STRIKE, it becomes invisible, and enemies cannot target it with ranged attacks or Charges. Weapons with the Keyword BLAST it as normal if it is in the radius of the weapon. This effect ends if this model moves from its exact position in any way, it makes a Ranged Attack, or an enemy model comes within 1.5” of it.
   * Undying. You no longer must roll on the Elite Trauma table for this model.
Ravenguard Only:
   * Echo Of The Ravenspire (LIMIT: 1). Once during each battle, as an Action that requires no roll, if this model is at least 6” away from all enemies that can see it, you can remove this model from the battlefield, then place it back on the battlefield anywhere at least 8” away from all enemies.
   * Feigned Flight. When this model Retreats, it can then Charge during the same Activation.
   * Shadowmaster. While this model is in cover from such an attack, enemies cannot make attacks against this model at Long Range.
Salamanders Only:
   * Lord Of Fire. This model’s attacks with the FIRE Keyword have +1 INJURY DICE.
   * Miraculous Constitution. When this model rolls on the Elite Trauma Chart, roll twice and choose one of the results.
   * Patient And Determined. Once during each of its Activations, instead of rolling to hit with a ranged attack, this model can choose to hit automatically.
Space Wolves Only:
   * Aura Of Majesty. This model’s Actions, Abilities, Skills, and psychic powers can treat its allies as if they were 6” closer than they are.
   * Beastslayer. This model has +1 INJURY DICE against enemy models that have the LARGE Keyword.
   * Resolve Of The Bear. The first -2 of this model’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS.
White Scars Only:
   * Hunter’s Instinct. This model has +1 INJURY DICE against enemy Elite models with all attacks it makes.
   * Master Rider. While this model is on an Astartes Bike, it can declare a Charge up to 16” away, and it has +2” movement speed during Charges.
   * Master Of Snares. Whenever an enemy model successfully Charges this model, that enemy suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER.

Adeptus Astartes Unique Equipment
   * Astartes Bike. The equipped model is mounted on a bike. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the VEHICLE Keyword, a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, and it is equipped with a Twin Boltgun, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Turbo-Boost ability. This battlekit cannot be taken along with Terminator Armour.
   * Twin Boltgun. 24”, +1 DICE, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL. This weapon can be used alongside any other ranged weapon when the rider takes the Shoot Action.
   * Turbo Boost. The rider has +1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, but it cannot climb sheer surfaces.
   * Malodraxian Standard. HELD. While the carrier is not Down, the first -1 of its Armour and the Armour of each of its ASTARTES allies within 4” of it have IMPERVIOUS
Adeptus Astartes Campaign Shop
During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.
   * Aegis Sigils (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Grey Knights Only, Equipment). Injury rolls with the PSYCHIC or IGNORE ARMOUR Keyword have -1 INJURY DICE against the equipped model.
   * Animus Malorum (7 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Legion of the Damned Only, Melee Weapon). Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, Injury rolls caused by this weapon cost 1 fewer BLOOD MARKER to make into a Bloodbath. If an enemy is taken Out of Action by this weapon, you can immediately remove all BLOOD MARKERS, INFECTION MARKERS, and STUN MARKERS from the equipped model or one of its ASTARTES allies within 12” of it.
   * Armour Indomitus (6 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Armour). -2 INJURY MODIFIER, IMPERVIOUS. Counts as Power Armour for models that must wear Power Armour.
   * Arridian Drakehide Cloak (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Salamanders Only, Equipment). Injury rolls made against the equipped model have -1 INJURY DICE, or -2 INJURY DICE if they have the FIRE Keyword.
   * Burning Blade (1 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Melee Weapon). Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, FIRE, TWO-HANDED
   * Centurion Warsuit (8 or 10 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Wearing Power Armour Only, Equipment). The equipped model’s armour improves to -3, and it gains the STRONG, TOUGH, and VEHICLE Keywords, but it can move only up to 3” when it Dashes. If it is already TOUGH, it can instead use that Keyword twice during each battle. When the model’s TOUGH Keyword is used during each battle (or the first time if it was already TOUGH), the Centurion Warsuit is removed for the remainder of the battle.


While a model is equipped with the Centurion Warsuit, it cannot use its normal weapons. Instead, it uses the warsuit’s weapons. When you purchase the Centurion Warsuit, choose one from each of the following sets of weapons. The equipped model is treated as being equipped with those weapons instead of its own until the warsuit is removed. The equipped model can take a Shoot Action with each of these ranged weapons during its Activation. These weapons do not count towards any limits.
   * A Combi-Bolter, Missile Launcher, or Krak Grenades
   * A Grav Cannon, Heavy Bolter, Heavy Flamer, or Lascannon. You can choose a Multi-Melta instead at a cost of +2 Glory.
   * Two Two-Handed Hammers or a Twin Siege Drill
   * Twin Siege Drill. Melee, +1 DICE, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, IGNORE ARMOUR, HEAVY
   * Honor Vehement (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Equipment). Whenever the equipped model or a friendly ASTARTES model within 6” of it Charges, roll 2d6 instead of 1d6 to determine the distance it moves, taking the highest result.
   * Icon of Obstinacy (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Imperial Fists Only, Equipment). The equipped model and each of its ASTARTES allies within 6” of it cannot be forcibly moved by the enemy, and never fall as a result of being Downed.
   * Inspired Retribution (3 Glory, Chaplain Only, no Variant Only, cannot be sold, Equipment). After the Chaplain or any friendly ASTARTES model within 6” of it is attacked in melee, the Chaplain can make a Success Roll. On a success, the attacking model gains a BLOOD MARKER.
   * Litany of Hate (4 Glory, Chaplain Only, Black Templars Only, cannot be sold, Equipment). BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on the attacks of the Chaplain or any friendly ASTARTES model within 6” of it.
   * Paragon Blade (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Melee Weapon). Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, ARMOUR PIERCING 2
   * Pelt of Balewolf (2 Glory, Elite Only, Space Wolves Only, Equipment). Enemies within 3” of the equipped model treat all of their enemies as if they had the FEAR Keyword.
   * Psyber-Berkut (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, mounted on Astartes Bike Only, White Scars Only, Ranged Weapon). 12”, ASSAULT, +1 DICE, takes no hands, this weapon can be used in addition to any other when taking the Shoot Action.
   * Raven’s Talons (2 Glory, LIMIT: 3, Equipped with Jump Pack Only, Ravenguard Only, Equipment). When the equipped model successfully Charges one or more enemies, one of those enemies gains a BLOOD MARKER.
   * Relic of the Primarch (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Captain Only, Equipment). Once per battle, as an Action that requires no roll, the bearer can unveil the relic. When it does, until the end of the current Turn, each friendly ASTARTES model on the battlefield has +1 DICE to Hit and +1 INJURY DICE with all melee attacks.
   * Shield Eternal (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Armour). Counts as a Shield, including for Shield Combo, -1 INJURY MODIFIER, IMPERVIOUS.
   * Signum Array (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Iron Hands Only, Equipment). Whenever the equipped model hits with a ranged attack with a non-THROWN weapon against an enemy, it and its allies have VICIOUS 11 against that same enemy with all non-THROWN ranged attacks until the end of the current Turn. If such an attack already has VICIOUS 11, it gains VICIOUS 10 instead.
   * Standard of Righteous Hatred (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Equipment). HELD, ICON. When the carrier or one of its ASTARTES allies within 12” of it is taken Out of Action, that model can make a single melee attack before it is removed from the battlefield. BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on such an attack.
   * Talisman of Sundered Souls (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Librarian Only, Equipment). The equipped model ignores the first Perils of the Warp roll it would make during each battle.
   * Tome of Malcador (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Librarian Only, Equipment). The equipped model can learn one additional psychic power from any of its normal discipline(s), or from any Shared Discipline. It must pay for this power as normal.
   * Visage of Death (1 Glory, Elite Only, Blood Angels Only, Equipment). The equipped model gains the FEAR Keyword.
   * Xenophase Sword (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Deathwatch Only, Melee Weapon). Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL
Librarius Psychic Discipline
   * The Avenger (25 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, 6”, Each Model Besides Self, each target must roll on the Injury table. This injury is considered to have the FIRE and IGNORE ARMOUR Keywords. This power cannot be used while within 1” of an enemy.
   * Might of Heroes (5 credits, Effect). 6”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, the target has +1 INJURY MODIFIER with all melee attacks.
   * Null Zone (5 credits, Effect). 6”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, the target cannot be targeted or affected by PSYCHIC weapons or abilities, and PSYCHIC Success Rolls cannot be used while within 6” of it.
   * Psychic Scourge (3 Glory, Attack). 18”, +1 INJURY MODIFIER for every BLOOD MARKER the target has, PSYCHIC, RISKY. On a miss, the caster suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER.
   * Shrouding (5 credits). No Range, Self, Next Activation, ranged attacks against the caster and any of its allies within 3” of it have -1 DICE to Hit.
   * Veil of Time (7 credits). 6”, Self or One Ally, Immediate, the target gains a BLESSING MARKER.

Battlekit
The Captain must be equipped with Power Armour or Terminator Armour, included in the cost and its statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Astartes Armoury.


Abilities
   * Black Carapace. The Captain treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hit instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.
   * Finest Hour. Once per battle, the Captain can make a single additional melee attack when it takes the Fight Action.


Keywords
ASTARTES, ELITE, LEADER, TOUGH

   * Narthecium. Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, HELD


Abilities
   * Black Carapace. The Apothecary treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hit instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.
   * Narthecium Healing. As an Action with a Success Roll with +1 DICE, the Apothecary can attempt to heal itself or one friendly ASTARTES model within 1” of it. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success.

Scout Marine (Cost: 40 credits +15 for armour)
You cannot include more Scout Marines in your Warband than you have other non-VEHICLE ASTARTES models.
Name
	Movement
	Ranged
	Melee
	Armour
	Base
	Scout Marine
	6”/Infantry
	+1
	+1
	-1
	32mm
	

Battlekit
The Scout Marine must be equipped with Standard Armour, included in the cost and its statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Astartes Armoury.


Abilities
   * Initiate. After a Scout Marine has participated in at least two missions, or if it scores a Glorious Deed or takes an enemy Elite model Out of Action, you can upgrade it to an Astartes at the end of a battle. It can continue to use any equipment specific to Scout marines. You can immediately purchase one of the Upgrades listed for Astartes for the normal price. These upgrades count towards the normal limits. You must then equip it with Power Armour before it can participate in any further missions (you can keep or sell its Standard Armour). It uses its new cost when calculating how many credits worth of models you can bring to a mission.


Keywords
ASTARTES, NO PROMOTION
Space Marine (Cost: 55 credits +40 for armour)
Name
	Movement
	Ranged
	Melee
	Armour
	Base
	Space Marine
	6”/Infantry
	+2
	+2
	-2
	32mm
	

Battlekit
The Space Marine must be equipped with Power Armour, included in the cost and its statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Astartes Armoury.


Abilities
   * Black Carapace. The Space Marine treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hit instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.


Upgrades
A model can take only one of these upgrades.
   * Assault Marine. Up to 2 Space Marines, or 3 in a Warband of 1,200 credits or more, can be upgraded to Assault Marines for +5 credits each, allowing them to use Jump Packs (purchased separately). While equipped with a Jump Pack, an Assault Marine gains the SKIRMISHER Keyword.
   * Bladeguard. Up to 2 Space Marines, or 3 in a Warband of 1,200 credits or more, can be upgraded to Bladeguard for +5 credits each, allowing them to roll 2D6 to determine their Charge distance instead of 1D6, taking the highest result.
   * Devastator. Up to 2 Space Marines, or 3 in a Warband of 1,200 credits or more, can be upgraded to Devastators for +5 credits each, allowing them to ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one ranged weapon they carry.
   * Inceptor. Up to 1 Space Marine can be upgraded to an Inceptor for +15 credits, granting it the benefits of the Assault Marine upgrade, as well as the following Ability. This upgrade also counts towards the limit of Assault Marines.
   * Pistoleer. The Inceptor has the following benefits while armed with Ranged Weapons with the PISTOL Keyword:
   * If it is equipped with 2 Weapons with the PISTOL Keyword, it can take a Shoot ACTION with one and then immediately take a Shoot ACTION with the other.
   * Add the IGNORE OFF-HAND WEAPON Keyword to any weapons that have the PISTOL Keyword.
   * Suppressor. Up to 1 Space Marine can be upgraded to a Suppressor for +15 credits, granting it the benefits of both the Assault Marine and Devastator upgrades, and it can carry one HEAVY ranged weapon even while equipped with a Jump Pack. This upgrade also counts towards the limits of both Assault Marines and Devastators.
   * Vanguard. Up to 2 Space Marines, or 3 in a Warband of 1,200 credits or more, can be upgraded to Vanguards for +5 credits each, granting them the INFILTRATOR Keyword.


Keywords
ASTARTES
0-2 Terminator (Cost: 80 credits +65 for armour)
You may include 0-3 Terminators in a Warband worth 1200 credits or more.
Name
	Movement
	Ranged
	Melee
	Armour
	Base
	Terminator

	+2
	+3
	-3
	40mm
	

Battlekit
The Terminator must be equipped with Terminator Armour, included in the cost and its statistics above and keywords below. This armour does not count towards any LIMIT. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Astartes Armoury. It can be equipped with a Cyclone Missile Launcher only if it already has another ranged weapon, and it cannot attack with both at the same time.


Abilities
   * Black Carapace. The Terminator treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hit instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.
   * Terminator Armour. The Terminator can wield a TWO-HANDED ranged weapon in one hand instead of a TWO-HANDED melee weapon due to its STRONG Keyword. Due to the bulk of its armour, the Terminator rolls only a D3 for extra charge distance instead of a D6.


Keywords
ASTARTES, DEEP STRIKE, LARGE, STRONG, VEHICLE
0-1 Dreadnought (Cost: 170 credits)
Name
	Movement
	Ranged
	Melee
	Armour
	Base
	Dreadnought
	6”/Infantry
	+3
	+3
	-3
	60mm
	

Battlekit
The Dreadnought is equipped with heavy armour plating, included in the cost and its statistics above. Instead of normal limits for hands, the Dreadnought can be equipped with up to a total of two TWO-HANDED and/or HEAVY weapons, melee or ranged. It must still obey the CUMBERSOME Keyword when fighting in melee. If it is equipped with only ranged weapons, it also counts as being equipped with a Close Combat Weapon.


Abilities
   * Dreadnought Armaments. While equipped with two ranged weapons, the Deadnought can make a Shoot Action with both of them during its Activation.
   * Wisdom of the Ancients. Other friendly ASTARTES models within 3” of the Dreadnought have +1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.


Keywords
ASTARTES, FEAR, LARGE, NEGATE SHRAPNEL, NO PROMOTION, STRONG, TOUGH, VEHICLE
