Warband Variant: Black Templar  
   * Templar Vows. Instead of the And They Shall Know No Fear special rule, at the start of each battle, choose one of the following Vows. That Vow’s benefits and drawbacks apply to each of your ASTARTES models until the end of the battle.
   * Suffer Not the Unclean to Live. The model has +1 INJURY DICE with melee attack against non-ARTIFICIAL non-VEHICLE enemies during an Activation in which it Charged. However, whenever the model Charges, it must charge the closest possible enemy model it can see even if the actual route to reach it is longer than to reach another.
   * Uphold the Honour of the Emperor. Injury rolls against the model have -1 DICE, but attack Success Rolls made against it have +1 DICE.
   * Abhor the Witch, Destroy the Witch. The model has +1 INJURY DICE against PSYKER enemies with melee attack, and has +2” movement so long as it moves in the most direct path towards an enemy PSYKER (it can avoid Difficult and Dangerous terrain). However, while an enemy PSYKER is within 8” of the model, the model has -1 DICE to all Success Rolls besides melee attacks.
   * Accept Any Challenge, No Matter the Odds. The model's melee attacks gain ARMOUR PIERCING 1 on a Critical Hit. However, the model cannot Retreat.
   * Sword Brethren. You can upgrade 2 additional Space Marines to Bladeguards, but can upgrade only 1 to a Vanguard.
   * Distrust of Psykers. You cannot recruit any Librarians.

________________
Warband Variant: Blood Angels  
      * The Red Thirst. Instead of the And They Shall Know No Fear special rule, during an Activation in which it Charged, each of your non-Dreadnought ASTARTES models have +1 INJURY DICE with melee attacks made against a target with 1 or more BLOOD MARKERS (even if all BLOOD MARKERS are spent  on the Injury roll).
      * The Black Rage. You cannot upgrade your models to Primaris in response to their death or gaining a Battle Scar (you can do so normally, though). Instead, whenever one of your ASTARTES models would be a Casualty or receive an Elite Trauma, you can instead have that model fall to the Black Rage. In the case of a Trauma, the Battle Scar is also ignored. A model that has fallen to the Black Rage has the NEGATE FEAR Keyword and the following Abilities:
      * Death Company. When the model charges, roll 2D6 instead of 1D6 and then add the highest of the two dice to its charge move.
      * Consumed. At the end of each battle, after rolling for casualties, roll a D6 for this model. On a result of 1-2, the model succumbs to the Black Rage and must be executed or sent away. It is removed from your roster, though you can keep its battlekit.
      * Rage. At the start of each of the model’s Activations, if there is any enemy it can see within 12” of it, its first Action must be to Charge the closest such enemy.
      * Upon Wings of Fire. You can upgrade 2 additional Space Marines to Assault Marines, but can upgrade only 1 to a Vanguard.
      * Sanguinary Psychic Discipline. Instead of the Librarius Psychic Discipline, your models choose powers from the Sanguinary Psychic Discipline, which has the following powers.
      * Quickening (10 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, No Range, Self, Immediate, the caster can make an attack with one of its melee weapons, which does not count as a Fight Action.
      * Unleash Rage (5 credits, Effect). 12”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, the target has VICIOUS 10, and has IGNORE ARMOUR on Critical Hits, when making melee attacks.
      * Shield of Sanguinius (10 credits, Effect). 18”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, Injury rolls against the target have -1 DICE.
      * Blood Boil (15 credits, Attack). 18”, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE, PSYCHIC, RISKY
      * Blood Lance (15 credits, Attack). 18”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, PSYCHIC, RISKY. When shot, draw a straight 12” line that is 1mm wide from the attacker. On a hit, all models along that line are hit.
      * Wings of Sanguinius (1 Glory, Effect). No Range, Self, Immediate, the caster can move up to its movement speed, and it counts as having FLYING during this movement.

Warband Variant: Dark Angels  
      * The Unforgiven. You do not benefit from the And They Shall Know No Fear special rule.
      * Deathwing. You can recruit up to 3 Terminators, or 4 in a Warband worth 1200 credits or more, and you can purchase up to 2 suits of Terminator Armour for your Elite models.
      * Ravenwing. You can purchase up to 4 Astartes Bikes, and up to 2 of your Elites can be equipped with them.
      * Bladeguard Veterans. You can upgrade 2 additional Space Marines to Bladeguard, but can upgrade only 1 to a Vanguard.
      * Implaccable. Your Dreadnoughts have +1 INJURY DICE when making melee attacks against models with the TOUGH Keyword.
      * Interromancy Psychic Discipline. Instead of the Librarius Psychic Discipline, your models choose powers from the Interromancy Psychic Discipline, which has the following powers.
      * Mind Worm (10 credits, Attack). 18”, -1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY. On a hit the target must move D3” in the direction of your choice. This movement can bring the target into or out of melee, and counts as a Charge and/or Retreat as appropriate.
      * Aversion (7 credits, Effect). 12”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target must move D6” directly away from the caster. This movement can bring the target into or out of melee, and counts as a Charge and/or Retreat as appropriate.
      * Righteous Repugnance (5 credits, Effect). 12”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, the target has +1 DICE to Hit and +1 INJURY DICE with melee attacks.
      * Trephenation (5 credits, Attack). 12”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN
      * Engulfing Fear (7 credits, Effect). 12”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target gains 2 STUN MARKERS. A target that ignores the FEAR Keyword is immune.
      * Mind Wipe (3 Glory, Effect). -1 DICE, 12”, One Enemy, End of Turn, the target loses all abilities (those listed in its statistics under “Abilities” and those gained by Upgrades besides Keywords and battlekit) and cannot use any psychic Powers.
      * Dark Angels Battlekit. Add the following battlekit to your Armoury:
      * Watcher in the Dark (5 credits, LIMIT: 3, Elite Only). Once per battle, when the equipped model is hit by an attack, the Injury roll has -1 DICE.

Warband Variant: Deathwatch  
      * Special Issue Ammunition. Instead of the And They Shall Know No Fear special rule, each of your non-Dreadnought ASTARTES models can be equipped with up to two types of AMMUNITION equipment. Only one type of ammunition can be applied to any given attack. You can also purchase the following ammunition types. Each can only be applied to a Bolt Carbine, Boltgun, Bolt Rifle, Bolt Sniper Rifle, Assault Bolter, Bolt Pistol, or Heavy Bolt Pistol. Note that this special Ammunition equipment is not CONSUMABLE.
      * Derevenant Shells (10 credits, LIMIT: 2). AMMUNITION (special). On a hit, after the normal Injury roll, the target must roll on the Injury table again with -2 INJURY DICE. Other properties of the weapon do not apply during this injury roll.
      * Dragonfire Bolts (10 credits, LIMIT: 3). AMMUNITION (FIRE).
      * Hellfire Rounds (5 credits, LIMIT: 4). AMMUNITION (GAS).
      * Inertial Fusion Bolts (5 credits, LIMIT: 4). AMMUNITION (special). Injury rolls caused by these attacks cannot be modified by -DICE.
      * Kraken Bolts (10 credits, LIMIT: 4). AMMUNITION (ARMOUR PIERCING 1).
      * Metal Storm Shells (5 credits, LIMIT: 4). AMMUNITION (SHRAPNEL).
      * Tempest Bolts (5 credits, LIMIT: 4). AMMUNITION (+1 INJURY DICE against targets with the ARTIFICIAL, MECHANICUS, or VEHICLE Keyword).
      * Thermic Acceleration Rounds (3 credits, LIMIT: 4). AMMUNITION (special). Attacks ignore all penalties to attack Success Rolls besides Cover, Long Range, and BLOOD MARKERS (including INFECTION and STUN), as well as penalties or limits to their range.
      * Inquisition Loyalty. Your patron cannot be the Indomitus Crusade, but you can choose the Lord Inquisitor Shared Patron.
      * Veterans. You cannot recruit any Scout Marines.
      * Xenopurge Discipline. Deathwatch models use this Discipline instead of the Librarius Discipline.
      * Premorphic Resonance (5 credits, Effect). 12”, Up to Three Among Self and Allies, Target Activation, each target has +1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.
      * Fortified With Contempt (7 credits, Effect). 12”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, the target treats Minor Hit results as No Result instead (except for an injury converted to Minor Hit from Down or Out of Action).
      * Neural Void (7 credits, Effect). 12”, One Enemy, Target Activation, the target has -1 DICE to all Success Rolls.
      * Psychic Cleanse (2 Glory, Attack). 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, +1 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC, RISKY
      * Mantle of Shadow (5 credits, Effect). No Range, Self, Next Activation, the caster and any allies within 6” of it have the STEALTH Keyword.
      * Severance (5 credits, Effect). 12”, One Enemy, End of Turn, the target cannot benefit from any +DICE, bonus, action, power, ability, upgrade, or Keyword that one of its allies has or uses, whether already in effect or later used.
      * Deathwatch Battlekit. You can purchase up to 1 Melta Bombs for 15 credits. Add the following battlekit to your Armoury:
      * Deathwatch Shotgun (18 credits). 18”, +1 DICE, SHOTGUN, Bayonet Lug, Shield Combo, ASSAULT, TWO-HANDED
      * Frag Cannon (15 credits, LIMIT: 2). 18”, BLAST 2”, SHRAPNEL, TWO-HANDED
      * Guardian Spear (35 credits, LIMIT: 1, Captain Only). BLOCK, TWO-HANDED, Shield Combo
      * Strike: Melee, CLEAVE 2
      * Shoot: 24”, +1 INJURY DICE
      * Immolation Rifle (15 credits, LIMIT: 2). 24”, FIRE
      * Infernus Heavy Bolter (80 credits, LIMIT: 1). HEAVY, TWO-HANDED
      * Bolter: 36”, +1 INJURY DICE, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL
      * Flamer: 10”, AUTOMATIC 2, -1 INJURY DICE, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE
      * Stalker Boltgun (20 credits). 30”, +1 DICE if fired from behind cover, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, Scope Capable
      * Stalker Bolt Rifle (25 credits, Primaris Only). 36”, +1 DICE if fired from behind cover, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, Scope Capable

Warband Variant: Grey Knights  
      * Brotherhood of Psykers. Instead of the And They Shall Know No Fear special rule, your ASTARTES models that do not already have the PSYKER Keyword gain the PSYKER 1 Keyword. When you recruit one of those models, select either the Dominus or Sanctus Discipline. That model may purchase up to three powers from that Discipline if it is ELITE, or one power if it is not. In order to use a Psychic Power, the model must be equipped with a PSYCHIC weapon.
      * Daemonic Nemesis. During a campaign, when you create your Warband or your Nemesis is Banished, choose one of your Elite models to be your Nemesis Hunter, and create a Nemesis. To do so, choose one of the following models from the Chaos Daemons Faction. It loses the ELITE and LEADER Keywords. The model is equipped and modified as follows:
      * Daemon Prince. Choose its Type, and it loses the Overlord Ability. You can choose this option only if your Warband’s credit limit is 1200 or higher.
      * Bloodmaster. Equipped with a Blade of Blood and Brass Horns.
      * Tranceweaver. Equipped with Lashes of Torment. Knows the Phantasmagoria power.
      * Poxbringer. Equipped with a Foul Balesword. Knows the Malodorous Pall power.
      * Changecaster. Equipped with a Herald Staff. Knows the P’tarix’s Sorcerous Syphon power.


At the start of each battle, if your opponent is a Chaos Warband, roll a D6, adding 1 for every battle the nemesis has not participated in since it last did (or since you created your Warband), as well as another 1 if your opponent has brought any DAEMON models to the battle. On a 5+, your Nemesis participates in the battle as if it were a model in your opponent’s Warband, except it does not count towards their number of models for the purposes of Morale and it does not join their warband permanently. During that battle, your Nemesis Hunter has +1 DICE to all Success Rolls, and Injury rolls are made at -1 DICE against it.


If you take your Nemesis Out of Action during the battle, make a Success Roll roll. On an 11+, your Nemesis is Banished.
      * +1 flat for every True Name Point it has
      * +1 DICE if your Nemesis Hunter took it Out of Action
      * +1 DICE if it was taken Out of Action by a melee attack
      * -1 DICE if it was taken Out of Action by a ranged attack


If your Nemesis is not Basinished, it permanently gains 1 True Name Point, stacking with any it already had. If your Nemesis is Banished, you earn 1 Glory and your Nemesis Hunter earns 2 XP. If your Nemesis was a Daemon Prince, you instead earn 2 Glory and your Nemesis Hunter earns 4 XP.
      * Inquisition Loyalty. Your patron cannot be the Indomitus Crusade, but you can choose the Lord Inquisitor Shared Patron.
      * Master Psyker. Your Librarian can purchase up to six Psychic Powers from the Dominus or Sanctus Discipline, but cannot take powers from the Librarius Discipline. In addition, it has PSYKER 3 instead of PSYKER 2 and costs +10 credits.
      * Terminator Brotherhood. You can recruit up to 3 Terminators, or 4 in a Warband worth 1200 credits or more, and you can purchase up to 4 suits of Terminator Armour for your Elite models.
      * Boots on the Ground. You cannot upgrade any of your Astartes to Assault Marines, Devastators, Inceptors, Suppressors, or Vanguards.
      * Completed Trials. You cannot recruit any Scout Marines.
      * First Born. You cannot upgrade your models to Primaris.
      * Dominus Psychic Discipline.
      * Gift of Infinity (20 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, 6”, Self or One Ally, Immediate, remove the target from the table, then place it on the table anywhere that is at least 8” away from all enemies.
      * Empryic Amplification (3 credits, Effect). 12”, One Enemy, End of Turn, Injury rolls against the target caused by PSYCHIC attacks or Success Rolls have +1 DICE.
      * Sanctuary (10 credits, Effect). 18”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, Injury rolls have -1 INJURY DICE against the target.
      * Vortex of Doom (7 credits, Attack). 12”, targets a point, BLAST 3”, PSYCHIC, RISKY, hit models are each moved D3” towards the center of the BLAST unless they are LARGE. This movement can bring the target into or out of melee, and counts as a Charge and/or Retreat as appropriate.
      * Warp Shaping (3 Glory, Effect). No Range, No Target, End of Turn, all PSYCHIC Success Rolls any model on the battlefield makes, including attacks, have your choice of +1 DICE or -1 DICE, chosen when you use this power.
      * Ghostly Bonds (12 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, 18”, One Enemy, Target Activation, the target cannot move or stand up from Down.
      * Sanctus Psychic Discipline.
      * Armoured Resilience (7 credits, Effect). No Range, Self, End of Turn, the first -2 of the caster’s Armour (including shields) has IMPERVIOUS.
      * Astral Aim (7 credits, Effect). No Range, Self, End of Turn, the caster has +2 DICE to Hit with all attacks.
      * Purge Soul (10 credits, Attack). 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY, -DICE cannot be applied to an injury roll caused by this attack.
      * Hammerhand (1 Glory, Attack). Melee, can be used during the same Activation the caster takes the Fight Action, PSYCHIC, RISKY
      * Purifying Flame (10 credits, Attack). 9”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE, PSYCHIC, RISKY
      * Ethereal Castigation (10 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, One Ally, immediate, the target can immediately make a single ranged attack.
      * Specialized Arsenal. You cannot take any Automatic Shotguns, Shotguns, Automatic Bolt Rifle, Bolt Rifles, Bolt Sniper Rifles, Combi-Weapons, Plasma Guns, Stalker Bolt Rifles, Autopistols, Plasma Pistols, Volkite Pistols, Plasma Cannons, Chain Blades, Chain Glaives, Chain Fists, Heavy Heavy Power Fists, Thunder Hammer, Lightning Claws, or Jump Packs.
      * Grey Knights Battlekit. Your non-Elite models can take Force Weapons, you can purchase up to 4 Force Weapons, and you can take up to 4 Flamers and 5 Storm Bolters, You cannot take any Power Weapons or Heavy Flamers. In addition, you can purchase any of the following battlekit:
      * Heavy Force Weapon (30 credits, LIMIT: 2, Psyker Only). Melee, +2 INJURY DICE, additional +1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, HEAVY, PSYCHIC, TWO-HANDED, HELD
      * Heavy Psycannon (45 credits, Psyker Only). 24”, VICIOUS 11, +1 INJURY DICE, additional +1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, CRITICAL, HEAVY, PSYCHIC, TWO-HANDED
      * Nemesis Force Weapon (25 credits, LIMIT: 1, Psyker Only). CUMBERSOME, TWO-HANDED, BLOCK, HELD
      * Strike: Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, Additional +1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, PSYCHIC
      * Bolter: 24”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL
      * Psilencer (40 credits, LIMIT: 2, Psyker Only). 24”, AUTOMATIC 2, ASSAULT, PSYCHIC
      * Psycannon (15 credits, Psyker Only). 24”, VICIOUS 11, +1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, CRITICAL, PSYCHIC

Warband Variant: Imperial Fists  
         * Architects of War. Instead of the And They Shall Know No Fear special rule, -1 of your ASTARTES models’ Armour have IMPERVIOUS.
         * Legacy of Dorn. You can upgrade up to 2 additional Space Marines to Devastators, but can upgrade only 1 to a Vanguard.

         * Tectonic Purge (5 credits, Effect). No Range, Self, End of Turn, enemies that Charge the caster or any of its allies within 6” of it do not add the normal D6 to their movement distance.
         * Wrack And Ruin (3 Glory, Effect). 12”, one piece of terrain of up to 8x8" size, Immediate, any models inside, touching, or on top of the chosen terrain piece must roll on the Injury Chart. Then roll 1D6. On a 5-6, the terrain piece is destroyed and it is removed from the table. Models not taken Out of Action that were on the terrain piece are placed on the ground in their previous spots.
         * Iron Inferno (5 credits, Attack). 18”, BLAST 3”, FIRE, PSYCHIC, RISKY
         * Fortify (5 credits, Effect). 12”, Self or One Ally, Immediate, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the chosen model.
         * Aspect Of Stone (7 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, No Range, Self, Next Activation, Injury rolls against the caster have -1 INJURY MODIFIER, stacking with armour up to -3, and it has +1 INJURY MODIFIER with all melee attacks it makes.
         * Chasm (10 credits, Attack). 18”, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN, a Minor Hit result becomes a Down result instead, even if the target normally ignores Down results. Enemies with FLYING or that always ignore Dangerous Terrain are immune.

         * Ocular: 10 credits

         * Techmarines. You can recruit a Techmarine Mercenary without any battlekit besides Power Armour for 120 credits. It counts as an Elite in your Warband instead of a Mercenary, and it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Astartes Armoury. You can still recruit a Techmarine Mercenary in addition to this model.
         * Calculated Fury. You can upgrade up to 2 additional Space Marines to Devastators.
         * Lost Battlekit. You can recruit only up to 1 Terminator, and cannot purchase any additional Terminator Armour.

Warband Variant: Legion of the Damned  
         * Apparitions. At the start of each battle, you can select up to half of your ASTARTES models, rounded up. Those models gain the DEEP STRIKE Keyword during this battle.
         * Eternal. Instead of the Gene Seeds special rule, you can reroll each casualty roll and Elite Trauma roll you make for each of your ASTARTES models, once for each roll, keeping the second result.
         * Legionnaires. You cannot take any Terminators or Dreadnoughts, and you cannot upgrade any of your models to Primaris. You cannot purchase Terminator Armour.
         * Burning Spectors. Your ASTARTES models have NEGATE FIRE, but you cannot remove BLOOD MARKERS from them (your opponent still can). Your PSYKER models can choose to take powers from the Pyromancy Shared Psychic Discipline instead of the Librarius Psychic Discipline (chosen on recruitment). Instead of the Narthecium Healing Ability, your Apothecaries have the following Ability:
         * Enkindle. As an Action with a Success Roll, the Apothecary can empower the flames within itself or an ASTARTES ally within 1” that it can see. On a success, the target’s melee weapons have FIRE until the end of the current Turn.
         * Mysterious. You cannot recruit any Mercenaries.

Warband Variant: Space Wolves  
         * Sagas. Instead of the And They Shall Know No Fear special rule, whenever one of your ASTARTES or Fenrisian Wolf models scores a Glorious Deed or takes an enemy ELITE model Out of Action, it has +1 DICE to all attack Success Rolls until the end of the battle. This effect does not stack.
         * Wolf Priest. You cannot take an Apothecary, but your Chaplain gain the following ability:
         * Poultices. As an Action with a Success Roll with +1 DICE, the Chaplain can attempt to heal itself or one friendly ASTARTES or Fenrisian Wolf model within 6” of it. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if it was a critical success.
         * Wolves of Winter. You cannot recruit any Scout Marines, and you cannot upgrade your Astartes to Assault Marines, Bladeguard, Devastators, Inceptors, Suppressors, or Vanguards, but you can recruit up to 3 Fenrisian Wolves and up to 3 Wulfen, each described below, as Troops in your Warband, and up to half of your Astartes, rounded down, can be equipped with Standard Armour instead of Power Armour.
         * Berserk Charge. Whenever one of your ASTARTES or Fenrisian Wolf models makes a melee attack, if it Charged during that Activation, it has +1 DICE to Hit.
         * Headstrong. Whenever one of your ASTARTES or Fenrisian Wolf models Charges, it must charge the closest possible enemy model that it can see, even if the actual route to reach it is longer than to reach another.
         * Tempestas Psychic Discipline. Instead of the Librarius Psychic Discipline, your models choose powers from the Tempestas Psychic Discipline, which has the following powers.
         * Living Lightning (5 credits, Attack). 18”, AUTOMATIC 2, -1 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN
         * Murderous Hurricane (3 Glory, Effect). 18”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, any enemy that Charges the target suffers D3 BLOOD MARKERS.
         * Tempest’s Wrath (5 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, 24”, One Enemy, Target Activation, the target has -1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.
         * Instincts Awoken (5 credits, Effect). 18”, Self or Ally, Target Activation, the target has ARMOUR PIERCING 1 with all attacks (this does not stack with other sources of ARMOUR PIERCING).
         * Storm Caller (5 credits, Effect). No Range, Self, Next Activation, ranged attacks against the caster and any of its allies within 6” of it have -1 DICE to Hit.
         * Jaws of the World Wolf (20 credits, Attack). 18”, +2 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, PSYCHIC, RISKY
         * Space Wolves Battlekit. You cannot purchase any Astartes Bikes, but add the following battlekit to your Armoury. You can equip (and unequip) a Techmarine Mercenary with a Thunderwolf, even though you normally cannot change its battlekit.
         * Death Totem (10 credits, LIMIT: 1, Wulfen Only). The equipped model gains the FEAR Keyword.
         * Great Frost Axe (25 credits, LIMIT: 2). Melee, +2 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, HEAVY
         * Great Wolf Claw (20 credits, LIMIT: 1, Dreadnought Only). Melee, CRITICAL, ARMOUR PIERCING 2
         * Stormfrag Auto-Launcher (12 credits, Wulfen Only). 12”, ASSAULT, BLAST 2”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, SHRAPNEL, takes no hands
         * Thunderwolf (55 credits, LIMIT: 3, Captain, Techmarine, or Space Marine Only). The equipped model is mounted on a giant wolf. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the BEAST Keyword, a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, and it is equipped with Jaws without taking up any hands. It also has the Thunderous Charge ability.
         * Jaws. Melee, CRITICAL. This weapon can be used alongside any other melee weapon when the rider takes the Fight Action, and does not suffer off-hand penalties, but uses a Melee Skill of +1 instead of the equipped model’s skill.
         * Thunderous Charge. The rider has +1 DICE to all Dash, Climb, and Jump Success Rolls In addition, whenever it successfully Charges one or more enemies, one of the enemies gains a BLOOD MARKER.
         * Wulfen Frost Claws (15 credits, Wulfen Only). Melee, CRITICAL, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, IGNORE OFF-HAND, comes as a pair of two weapons.

Battlekit
The Fenrisian Wolf is equipped with its Teeth and Claws. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.
         * Teeth and Claws. Melee, CLEAVE 2


Abilities
         * Predatory Instinct. When an enemy with 12” of the Fenrisian Wolf Charges one of the Fenrisian Wolf’s allies, the Fenrisian Wolf can immediately activate, before the Charge roll is made, if it has not yet activated this Turn. Its first action must be to Charge that enemy, and if it fails to enter close combat, its Activation ends. At the end of this Activation, the enemy’s Activation continues if it is still on the battlefield. Otherwise, normal Activation order continues as if that enemy’s Activation had just ended.
         * Hunting Hound. The Fenrisian Wolf has +1 DICE on all Dash, Climb, and Jump Success Rolls.


Keywords
BEAST, LARGE, NO PROMOTION

Warband Variant: White Scars  
         * Devastating Charge. Instead of the And They Shall Know No Fear special rule, whenever one of your ASTARTES models equipped with an Astartes Bike successfully Charges one or more enemies, one of those enemies gains a BLOOD MARKER.
         * Biker Phalanx. You can purchase up to 6 Astartes Bikes, and up to 3 of your Elites can be equipped with them. 
         * Stormspeaking Psychic Discipline. Instead of the Librarius Psychic Discipline, your models choose powers from the Stormspeaking Psychic Discipline, which has the following powers.
         * Blasting Gale (5 credits, Attack). 18”, PSYCHIC, RISKY. If the caster hits a target that is not LARGE, the hit model is moved in a straight line D6” directly away from the wielder. This movement allows free attacks as if it were a Retreat Action. This power cannot be used while in close combat.
         * Lightning Call (15 credits, Attack). 18”, AUTOMATIC 3, PSYCHIC, RISKY. All attacks must target the same model.
         * Ride The Winds (5 credits, Effect). 12”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, the target has +1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, and it gains FLYING.
         * Storm-Weathered (3 credits, Effect). 12”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, enemy models do not get free attacks against the target when it Retreats, and the target can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.
         * Spirits of Chogoris (5 credits, Effect). -1 DICE, 12”, Up to Three Enemies, Target Activation, the target has -1 DICE to all Success Rolls.
         * Eye of the Storm (2 Glory, Effect). 8”, Each Model Besides Self, target must roll on the Injury table. This injury is considered to have the STUN Keyword, and has +1 INJURY DICE against any target with FLYING.
Adeptus Custodes
Adeptus Custodes
  

Adeptus Custodes Special Rules
Endeavors. During a campaign, when you create your Warband, also begin a new Endeavor. To do so, determine 3 of the following Imperatives at random, in order, rerolling duplicates. You must complete those Imperatives, in the order they were generated, one during each battle.
         * 1: Emperor’s Domain. End the battle with more friendly models than enemy models in your own deployment zone.
         * 2: Wrath of the Emperor. Take at least four enemy models Out of Action before the end of the third Turn during this battle.
         * 3: Make an Example. Win the battle.
         * 4: Vital Targets. Take at least three enemy Elite models Out of Action during this battle. If the enemy has fewer than three Elites, take all of them Out of Action instead.
         * 5: Shadowed Directive. Keep all of your models from being taken Out of Action during the first two Turns of the battle.
         * 6: Absolute Mastery. Score at least two Glorious Deeds during the battle.
         * 7: Shadow of the Throne. At the end of the battle, have more of your models within 12” of the center of the battlefield than there are enemy models.
         * 8: Martial Supremacy. During this battle, take at least two enemy models Out of Action for every one of your own that is taken Out of Action (if none of your models are taken Out of Action, you automatically succeed).
         * 9: Alpha Threat Confirmed. Take the enemy Warband leader Out of Action during the battle.
         * 10: Annihilation. Take every enemy model Out of Action, or win via the enemy failing a Morale Test.
         * 11: Emperor’s Will Be Done. End the battle with more friendly models than enemy models in the enemy’s deployment zone.
         * 12: Inspirational Example. Take at least four enemy models Out of Action with melee attacks during this battle.


If you complete all three of an Endeavor’s Imperatives, you gain an Endeavor Reward and generate a new Endeavor. If you fail to complete an Imperative during a battle, you suffer Dishonor and generate a new Endeavor. You can also choose to abandon an Endeavor and generate a new one if you have completed at least one of its Imperatives, in which case, if you completed two Imperatives, you still receive an Endeavor Reward, chosen at random. If you completed only one, there is no benefit or penalty.


Endeavor Rewards
Choose a Reward from the following options if you completed an Endeavor. Choose a Reward at random instead if you abandoned an Endeavor after completing only two Imperatives.
         * 1. You earn 2 Glory.
         * 2. You roll an additional Promotion die after this and every battle for the rest of the campaign. This benefit stacks.
         * 3. Each of your Elite models gains 1 XP.
         * 4. One of your Elite models gains 2 XP.
         * 5. One of your Elite models gains 1 XP and you earn 1 Glory.
         * 6. Your Warband permanently gains one Exploration Skill of your choice.


Dishonor
Whenever you suffer Dishonor, ignore the next 1 Glory Point you would earn for every incomplete Imperative in the failed Endeavor. This resets rather than stacking if you fail another.
Adeptus Custodes Patrons
Your patron can be the Captain-General, or the Indomitus Crusade Shared Patron.
Patron: Captain-General
Or a similar high ranking member of the Adeptus Custodes.
         * Champion of the Imperium. If any ally within 1” of this model is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to this model instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit this model.
         * Impregnable Mind. This model cannot be forced to move.
         * Master Of Martial Strategy (LIMIT: 1). After you activate this model, you decide the next 3 models to activate, following the normal limits (i.e. the second will usually be your own model again). If you choose a model in a Fireteam, the model's owner decides if it will activate as a Fireteam or individually.
         * Peerless Warrior. This model has +1 INJURY DICE with all attacks.
         * Radiant Mantle. All attacks made against this model have -1 DICE to Hit.
         * Superior Creation (non-Psykana Only). This model has NEGATE FIRE, NEGATE GAS, and NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

Adeptus Custodes Ranged Weapons
         * Adrastus Bolt Caliver. TWO-HANDED, Scope Capable
         * Bolter. 30”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL
         * Disintegrator. 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR
         * Balistus Grenade Launcher. 18”, BLAST 2”, ASSAULT, SHRAPNEL, IGNORE COVER, THROWN
         * Kinetic Destroyer. 12”, ASSAULT, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, PISTOL, Scope Capable
         * Salvo Launcher. 24”, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, HEAVY
         * Twin Las-Pulsar. 24”, +1 DICE, +1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY
         * Twin Adrathic Destructor. 18”, +1 DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR at Short Range
         * Vertus Hurricane Bolter. 18”, AUTOMATIC 2, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED
Adeptus Custodes Melee Weapons
         * Executioner Greatblade. Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, another +1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, TWO-HANDED
         * Interceptor Lance. Melee, BLOCK, +1 INJURY DICE if the wielder Charged during this Activation, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, Shield Combo
         * Misericordia. Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR of Down targets
         * Solerite Power Gauntlet. Melee, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, IGNORE ARMOUR, HEAVY
         * Solerite Power Talon. Melee, +2 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL, HEAVY, RISKY
         * Tarsis Buckler. Melee, HELD. Melee attacks have -1 DICE to Hit the wielder.
         * Vaultswords. Melee, CUMBERSOME, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED
         * Behemor: +2 INJURY DICE
         * Hurricanus: CLEAVE 2
         * Victus: IGNORE ARMOUR
Adeptus Custodes Combined Weapons
         * Achillus Dreadspear. BLOCK, HEAVY, HELD, Shield Combo
         * Strike: Melee, CUMBERSOME, +1 INJURY DICE, another +1 INJURY DICE if the wielder Charged during this Activation, IGNORE ARMOUR
         * Shoot: 12”, +2 INJURY DICE at Short Range
         * Adrasite Spear. BLOCK, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED, HELD, Shield Combo
         * Strike: Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, CUMBERSOME
         * Shoot: 18”, ASSAULT, IGNORE ARMOUR at Short Range
         * Castellan Axe. HEAVY, TWO-HANDED, HELD, Shield Combo
         * Strike: Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, CUMBERSOME
         * Shoot: 24”, +1 INJURY DICE
         * Galatus Warblade. HEAVY, TWO-HANDED, HELD
         * Strike: Melee, CRITICAL, +1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR
         * Shoot: 10”, AUTOMATIC 2, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE, HEAVY
         * Guardian Spear. BLOCK, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED, HELD, Shield Combo
         * Strike: Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, CUMBERSOME
         * Shoot: 24”, +1 INJURY DICE

         * Shoot: 12”, +1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, RISKY

         * Strike: Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY
         * Shoot: 12”, ASSAULT, +1 INJURY DICE
Adeptus Custodes Armour
         * Aquilon Armour. -3 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY. Model gains the DEEP STRIKE and VEHICLE Keywords. Aquilon Armour cannot be combined with Auramite Pinions or Dawneagle Jetbike.
         * Auramite Armour. -3 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY.
         * Praesidium Shield (Shield-Captain Only). HELD, COVER, HEAVY, the first -1 of the bearer’s armour has IMPERVIOUS. Counts as a Shield, including for Shield Combo.
Adeptus Custodes Equipment
         * Amelioration Pail. As an Action with no roll required, the equipped model can consume the pail to remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from itself.
         * Auramite Pinions. The model gains FLYING and +2” movement speed. At the start of the equipped model’s Activation, it can choose to lose the normal benefit and gain COVER until the start of its next Activation.
         * Dawneagle Jetbike. The equipped model is mounted on a jet bike. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the VEHICLE Keyword, a movement speed of 10”/Flying, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Built-In Weapon and Turbo-Boost abilities. This battlekit cannot be taken along with Aquilon Armour.
         * Built-In Weapon. The rider can be equipped with up to 1 additional non-Grenade ranged weapon, which does not take any hands, and can be used alongside any other ranged weapon when the rider takes the Shoot Action.
         * Turbo-Boost. The rider has +1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.
         * Vexilla. HELD. As long as the wielder is not Down or Out of Action, you automatically pass all Morale Tests.
Adeptus Custodes Campaign Shop
During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.
         * Anathematic Diadem (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, ANATHEMA Only, Equipment). Enemies within 12” of the equipped model have -1 DICE on all PSYCHIC Success Rolls, including attacks. In addition, the equipped model has +1 DICE when Denying the Witch.
         * Apollonian Spear (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Combined Weapon). BLOCK, HEAVY, Injury rolls cannot benefit from any -DICE, TWO-HANDED, Shield Combo
         * Strike: Melee, CUMBERSOME, CLEAVE 2
         * Shoot: 18”, ARMOUR PIERCING 2
         * Arae-Shrike (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Equipment). Enemy models must be set up at least 16” away from this model when using the DEEP STRIKE or INFILTRATOR Keywords. In addition, enemy models within 12” of the equipped model cannot target or affect any of that model’s allies with their abilities, battlekit, or psychic powers if those allies are further than 1” away.
         * Auriferous Orbs (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Ranged Weapon). 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 3”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, IGNORE ARMOUR, THROWN, FUMBLE, on a hit, a target suffers -1 DICE to all of its attacks during its next Activation.
         * Auspice Mantle (9 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Equipment). Ranged attacks cannot be made against the equipped model if the attacker is more than 12” away from it.
         * Epoch Auspice (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Equipment). The equipped model and each ally within 3” of it has the STEALTH Keyword.
         * Lucent Aureole (6 Glory, LIMIT: 1, non-PSYKANA Only, Equipment). The first -2 of the equipped model’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS.
         * Mortis Gyre (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Equipment). Injury rolls caused by melee weapons the equipped model wields cannot be modified by -DICE.
         * Sword of Oblivion (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Melee Weapon).  Melee, CRITICAL, +1 INJURY DICE, another +1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, TWO-HANDED
         * Twilight Pallium (8 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Equipment). As an Action with a Success Roll, the equipped model can teleport to a location anywhere within 1” of any enemy model on the battlefield. This counts as a Charge Action for the purposes of Action limitations and the ASSAULT Keyword, and once it is successful, it cannot be used again during that battle.
Adeptus Custodes Elites
0-1 Shield-Captain (125 credits +50 or 70 for armour)
Name
	Movement
	Ranged
	Melee
	Armour
	Base
	Shield-Captain
	6”/Infantry
	+3
	+3
	-3
	40mm
	

Battlekit
The Shield-Captain must be equipped with Auramite Armour or Aquilon Armour, included in its cost and statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Custodes Armoury.


Abilities
         * Aegis of the Emperor. The Shield-Captain treats any Out of Action result from the Injury Roll Table as a Down result instead unless the result was caused by a Bloodbath (in which case its TOUGH Keyword still applies). However, you cannot remove BLOOD MARKERS from the Shield-Captain except via an Amelioration Pail (the opposing player can use them normally).
         * Master of Stances. When the Shield-Captain makes an attack, that attack has your choice of the ARMOUR PIERCING 1 Keyword, stacking with all other sources of ARMOUR PIERCING, or the CRITICAL Keyword.
         * Stand Vigil. The Shield-Captain treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hit instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH or Aegis of the Emperor.
         * Strategic Mastery. As an Action with no roll, choose any one model the Chield-Captain can see, ally or enemy, that has not yet activated this Turn. The Shield-Captain’s Activation ends and that model’s Activation begins.


Keywords
CUSTODES, ELITE, LARGE, LEADER, STRONG, TOUGH

Battlekit

Abilities
         * Aegis of the Emperor. The Blade Champion treats any Out of Action result from the Injury Roll Table as a Down result instead unless the result was caused by a Bloodbath. However, you cannot remove BLOOD MARKERS from the Blade Champion except via an Amelioration Pail (the opposing player can use them normally).
         * Martial Inspiration. Melee attacks made by the Blade Champion and any of its allies within 3” of it have the CRITICAL Keyword.
         * Stand Vigil. The Blade Champion treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hit instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with Aegis of the Emperor.
         * Swift Onslaught. Whenever the Blade Champion Charges, roll 2D6 instead of 1D6 and then add the highest of the two dice to its charge move.

         * Deny the Witch. The Knight-Centura can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 1.
         * Seeker’s Instincts. The Knight-Centura has +1 DICE to all Dash actions.

Upgrades
         * Witchseeker. Up to half of your Anathema Psykana, rounded down, can be upgraded to Witchseekers for +10 credits each.
         * Deny the Witch. The Witchseeker can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 1.
         * Sanctified Flames. The Witchseeker’s ranged attacks have the FIRE Keyword.

Upgrades
A Custodian Guard can be upgraded with only one of the following.
         * Allarus Custodian. Up to 2 Custodian Guards can be upgraded to Allarus Custodians for +15 credits each, granting them the following abilities:
         * From Golden Light. The Allarus Custodian has the DEEP STRIKE Keyword.
         * Slayer of Tyrants. The Allarus Custodian has +1 INJURY DICE with attacks made against enemy ELITE models.
         * Custodian Warden. Up to 2 Custodian Guards can be upgraded to Custodian Wardens for +10 credits each, granting them the NEGATE FEAR Keyword and the following ability:
         * Living Fortress. The first -1 of the Custodian Warden’s Armour gains IMPERVIOUS.
         * Venatari Custodian. Up to 2 Custodian Guards can be upgraded to Venatari Custodian for +5 credits each, allowing them to use Auramite Pinions and Tarsis Bucklers, and granting them the SKIRMISHER Keyword while wearing Auramite Pinions.

Battlekit
The Contemptor Dreadnought is equipped with heavy armour plating, included in its cost and its statistics above. Instead of normal hand limits, the Contemptor Dreadnought can be equipped with one of the following:
         * One Galatus Warblade
         * Up to two other TWO-HANDED weapons
         * A single other TWO-HANDED weapon and a Praesidium Shield.
It must still obey the CUMBERSOME Keyword when fighting in melee. If it is equipped with only ranged weapons, it also counts as being equipped with a Close Combat Weapon.


Abilities
         * Dread Foe. When this model successfully Charges one or more enemy models, those models must each roll on the Injury table.
         * Dreadnought Armaments. While equipped with two ranged weapons, the Contemptor Deadnought can make a Shoot Action with both of them during its Activation.
         * Unyielding Ancient. Injury rolls made against the Contemptor Dreadnought have -1 INJURY DICE.

Adeptus Mechanicus
Adeptus Mechanicus
  

Adeptus Mechanicus Special Rules
Canticles of the Omnissiah. At the start of each Turn, choose one of the following Canticles. That Canticle applies until the start of the next Turn. You cannot choose the same Canticle twice in a row. Alternatively, you can choose a Canticle randomly, in which case it can be the same Canticle as the previous one.
         1. Benediction of the Omnissiah. Your MECHANICUS models can reroll one die during each Success Roll they take to Hit with a ranged attack.
         2. Chant of the Remorseless Fist. When one of your MECHANICUS models hits an enemy in melee, you can reroll one INJURY DIE.
         3. Invocation of Machine Vengeance. Your MECHANICUS models have +1 DICE when taking the Dash Success Roll.
         4. Incantation of the Iron Soul. You gain +1 DICE to Morale Tests made for your Warband.
         5. Litany of the Electromancer. Your MECHANICUS models have BLOCK.
         6. Shroudpsalm. Your MECHANICUS models have STEALTH. Any model that already has STEALTH replaces the effects of that keyword with: Enemies have -1 DICE to hit this model with ranged attacks.


The Search For Archeotech. During a campaign, at the start of each battle, before deployment, your opponent places a 1” Archeotech marker anywhere that is exactly half the battlefield size away from your deployment zone (18” away for 3’x3’ board, 24” away for a 4’x4’ board), but not within 6” of a battlefield edge or on Impassable Terrain or completely surrounded by it.


As an Action with a Success Roll, any of your models in contact with the marker can recover that marker. On a success, you recover the archeotech. At the end of the battle, if you recovered the archeotech, add it to your reserves. Roll a D6 to determine its type:
         * 1-3. Power Source
         * 4. Weapon Part
         * 5. Force Field Part
         * 6. Techno-Arcana


Then roll a D6 to determine its precise nature:
Roll
	Power Source
	Weapon Part
	Force Field Part
	Techno-Arcana
	1
	Restrained Vortex
	Electro-Fire Implements
	Void Shell
	Obscuroptikon
	2
	Spatial Alternator
	Neural Jammer
	Arc Implants
	Exo-Gauntlet
	3
	Teleportation Matrix
	Nanoshard Projector
	Time Sink
	Ferrosanctic Orrery
	4
	Acidic Conductor
	Arc Annulus
	Conversion Eradicator
	Hagioscope
	5
	Endothermic Reactor
	Electro-Fused Vambraces
	Inverse Power Feeds
	Tri-Dimensional Covenant
	6
	Induction Node
	Digital Cannon
	Technodermis
	Hypercircuit
	

Reconstructing Archeotech
By combining a Power Source with a Weapon Part, Force Field Part, or Techno-Arcana, you can create a piece of functioning Archeotech battlekit. The effect of this piece of battlekit is determined by the Weapon Part, Force Field Part, or Techno-Arcana, with an additional modification based on the Power Source.


Any of your non-Mercenary MECHANICUS models can be equipped with Archeotech. A model can be equipped with only up to 1 Archeotech Weapon, 1 Archeotech Force Field, and 1 Archeotech Techno-Arcana.


You can sell functioning pieces of Archeotech battlekit for 1 Glory apiece.


Archeotech Weapons
         * Electro-Fire Implements. 12”, +1 DICE, -1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT, FIRE, takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle.
         * Neural Jammer. 18”, -1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL, STUN, takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle. Cannot be used against an ARTIFICIAL target.
         * Nanoshard Projector. 12”, +1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, PISTOL, takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle.
         * Arc Annulus. 18”, if the target would have an armour modifier from any source other than a shield, you may set one die of the injury roll to a 6 before the roll is made. The rest of the dice for the injury roll are rolled as normal. Takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle.
         * Electro-Fused Vambraces. 18” (always uses ranged skill), ASSAULT, STUN, PISTOL, takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle.
         * Digital Cannon. 24”, +1 INJURY DICE, takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle.


Weapon Power Sources
         * Restrained Vortex. The weapon gains BLAST 3”. The wielder is never hit due to this Keyword.
         * Spatial Alternator. On a hit, the target must also move D3” in the direction of your choice, including falling, free attack from leaving melee, etc.
         * Teleportation Matrix. Immediately after a hit with the weapon, if the target is still on the battlefield, the wielder can teleport to anywhere within 1” of the target that is not within 1” of any other enemy.
         * Acidic Conductor. The weapon has VICIOUS 10.
         * Endothermic Reactor. A target hit by the weapon has half movement during its next Activation.
         * Induction Node. A target hit by the weapon has -1 DICE to hit with all attacks until the end of its next Activation.


Archeotech Force Fields
         * Void Shell. Once per battle, the bearer can treat one Down Injury result as a Minor Hit instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.
         * Arc Implants. When an enemy successfully Charges the bearer, that enemy gains 1 STUN MARKER.
         * Time Sink. Once per battle, as an Action that requires no roll, the bearer can choose one enemy it can see within 12” that has not activated this Turn. That enemy cannot activate until your opponent has activated D3 other models, or until there is no choice.
         * Conversion Eradicator. When the bearer is taken Out of Action, one enemy within 12” of it suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER.
         * Inverse Power Feeds. The bearer’s melee attacks score a Critical Hit on a roll of 11 or higher.
         * Technodermis. Once per battle, the bearer can apply -1 DICE to one Injury roll made against it.


Force Field Power Sources
         * Restrained Vortex. Any enemy that Charges the bearer has -1 DICE to Hit it with melee attacks until the end of the Turn.
         * Spatial Alternator. The bearer has +1” to its movement speed.
         * Teleportation Matrix. When the bearer takes the Dash Success Roll, it can ignore terrain and enemy models during that movement.
         * Acidic Conductor. Melee attacks against the bearer lose the ARMOUR PIERCING 1 Keyword. This does not affect ARMOUR PIERCING 2 or IGNORE ARMOUR.
         * Endothermic Reactor. When an enemy Charges the bearer, subtract 2” from its movement during that Charge.
         * Induction Node. Once per battle, the bearer can gain +1 DICE to Hit with one attack it makes.


Archeotech Techno-Arcanas
         * Obscuroptikon. While the Shroudpsalm Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.
         * Exo-Gauntlet. While the Chant of the Remorseless Fist Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.
         * Ferrosanctic Orrery. While the Incantation of the Iron Soul Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.
         * Hagioscope. While the Benediction of the Omnissiah Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.
         * Tri-Dimensional Covenant. While the Invocation of Machine Vengeance Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.
         * Hypercircuit. While the Litany of the Electromancer Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.


Techno-Arcana Power Sources
         * Restrained Vortex. While this techno-arcana is active, +DICE cannot be added to Injuries caused by melee attacks against the bearer or any of its allies within 6”, except due to spending BLOOD MARKERS and INFECTION MARKERS.
         * Spatial Alternator. While this techno-arcana is active, enemies have -1 DICE to hit the bearer and any of its allies within 6” of the bearer with ranged attacks.
         * Teleportation Matrix. While this techno-arcana is active, the bearer and any of its allies within 6” of it always Charge the full 12”, regardless of the roll or any penalties to Charge distance. Other effects such as Difficult Terrain still apply.
         * Acidic Conductor. While this techno-arcana is active, increase the range of all non-THROWN ranged weapons the bearer and any of its allies within 6” of it wield by 6”.
         * Endothermic Reactor. While this techno-arcana is active, enemy models never get free attacks against the bearer or any of its allies within 6” when they Retreat, and the the bearer and any of its allies within 6”  can move out of Melee Combat using their Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.
         * Induction Node. While this techno-arcana is active, the bearer and any of its allies within 6” of it have +1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.
Adeptus Mechanicus Patrons
Your patron can be a Fabricator Locum or a Skitarii Overlord.
Patron: Fabricator Locum
Or a similar high-ranking member of the Adeptus Mechanicus.
         * Emotionless Clarity. This model and each friendly MECHANICUS model within 6” of it have IGNORE FEAR.
         * Masterwork Bionics. This model has +1 DICE to all Climb, Dash, Jump, and Diving Charge Success Rolls.
         * First-Hand Field Testing. The first attack this model makes with a ranged weapon during each of its Activations has ARMOUR PIERCING 1, stacking with all other sources of ARMOUR PIERCING.
         * Necromechanic. This model has +1 DICE to use Actions that remove BLOOD MARKERS from friendly models, and whenever it would remove exactly 1 BLOOD MARKER with such an Action, it removes D3 instead.
         * Cartogrammatist. This model gains the Exploration Skill of your choice.
         * Supervisory Radiance. Friendly non-Elite MECHANICUS models within 3” of this model have +1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.
Patron: Skitarii Overseer
Or a similar high-ranking Skitarii officer.
         * Archived Engagements. All attacks have -1 DICE to Hit this model.
         * Battle-Sphere Uplink. Select any skill you want from the Ranged Skills.
         * Eyes Of The Omnissiah. This model ignores all -DICE to Hit with ranged attacks.
         * Firepoint Telemetry Cache. This model has the COVER and STLEATH Keywords.
         * Multitasking Cortex. This model may form a FIRETEAM with any one non-ELITE model of the Warband. In addition, the first time one of the models fails a Risky Success Roll during a Fireteam Activation, the Activation does not end.
         * Programmed Retreat. Enemy models never get free attacks against this model when it Retreats, and this model can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.

Adeptus Mechanicus Equipment
         * Imperative Surge-Wafer (CONSUMABLE). The model consuming this data-wafer gains +2” movement speed for the duration of the battle.
         * Omnispex. The model’s Ranged Attacks ignore Cover.
         * Serberys Construct. The equipped model is mounted on a mechanical horse. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the ARTIFICIAL Keyword, and the SKIRMISHER and VEHICLE Keywords, a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, and it is equipped with Clawed Limbs, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Mechanical Steed ability.
         * Clawed Limbs. Melee, +1 DICE, CRITICAL. This weapon can be used alongside any other melee weapon when the rider takes the Fight Action, and does not suffer off-hand penalties.
         * Mechanical Steed. The rider has +1 DICE to all Dash, Climb, and Jump Success Rolls
         * Servo-Skull. The model has +1 INJURY MODIFIER with all attacks.
Adeptus Mechanicus Campaign Shop
During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.
         * Adamantine Arm (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Melee Weapon). Melee, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, ARMOUR PIERCING 2
         * Autocaduceus (8 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Leader Only, Melee Weapon). Melee, +1 INJURY DICE, STUN. Once during each battle, when another friendly ARTIFICIAL, MECHANICUS, or VEHICLE model within 12” that the equipped model can see suffers an Out of Action or Down result on the Injury chart, you can turn that result into a Minor Hit result instead.
         * Cerebral Techno-Mitre (1 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Equipment). The range of all of the model’s abilities (those in its statistics) is increased by 3”.
         * Eye Of Xi-Lexum (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Equipment). As an Action that requires no roll, the equipped model can choose one enemy it can see within 18” of it. The next model besides the equipped model that makes a ranged attack against that enemy before the end of the current Turn has +1 INJURY MODIFIER during that attack.
         * Kardiocore Galvanus (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Skitarii Marshal or Skitarii Only, Equipment). The equipped model has +1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.
         * Multiplexed Neural Inducer (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Equipment). As an Action that requires no roll, the equipped model can choose one ally it can see within 12”. The equipped model’s Activation ends and the chosen model’s Activation immediately begins. That model has +1 DICE on all Success Rolls during that Activation.
         * Omnissiah’s Hand (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Ranged Weapon). 6”, PISTOL, -1 INJURY DICE, takes no hands, can be used in addition to any other attacks the equipped model makes.
         * Solar Atomizer (6 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Ranged Weapon). 12”, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, ASSAULT, BLAST 2”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, IGNORE ARMOUR within 6”, TWO-HANDED
         * Solar Flare (7 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Equipment). Once per battle, as an Action with no roll, the equipped model can use the Solar Flare to teleport. Remove it from the table, then place it on the table anywhere that is at least 8” away from all enemies.
         * Transinduction Body (6 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Equipment). The equipped model can continue spending its movement after a Charge, remaining within 1” of the target, even if it does not bring them into melee with any other enemies. The equipped model ignores Difficult, Dangerous, and Blocking Terrain as well as enemy models when it moves during its Activation. In addition, enemy models never get free attacks against the equipped model when it Retreats, and the equipped model can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.

         * Lord of the Machine Cult. As an Action with a Success Roll with +1 DICE, the Dominus can change the current Canticle. On a success, you can choose a new Canticle, replacing the one you chose at the start of the Turn. You cannot choose either of those Canticles at the start of the next Turn.
         * Mechadendrites. The Dominus has an additional hand for both melee and ranged combat. Its additional melee hand can carry only a Claw weapon. It can attack with an additional weapon whenever it takes the Melee or Shoot Action, without off-hand penalties.

         * Mechadendrites. The Tech-Priest has an additional hand for both melee and ranged combat. Its additional melee hand can carry only a Claw weapon. It can attack with an additional weapon whenever it takes the Melee or Shoot Action, without off-hand penalties.

Battlekit
The Kataphron is equipped with armour plating, included in its statistic above. It can be equipped with any single ranged TWO-HANDED weapon and up to two Claw melee weapons from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury.

         * Robotic Bodyguard. If any ally within 1” of the Kastelan Robot is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Kastelan Robot instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Kastelan Robot.

         * Scyllax Horrors. You can include up to 2 Scyllax Automata, described below, as Troops in your Warband.
         * Daemon Engines. Your Kataphrons and Kastelan Robots gain the DAEMON Keyword.

Adeptus Ministorum
Adeptus Ministorum
  

Adeptus Ministorum Special Rules
Battle Hymns. At the start of each Turn, choose one of the following Hymns. That Hymn is being spoken by each of your ORATOR models during that Turn, so long as it is not Down. Each ORATOR and each friendly ECCLESIARCHY model within 6” of it have the benefits of the chosen Hymn.
            * The Emperor Protects. The first -1 of armour of affected models has IMPERVIOUS, and -DICE can always be applied to Injury rolls against them even if another rule would prevent this.
            * The Emperor’s Strength. Affected models have ARMOUR PIERCING 1 with all of their melee attacks, stacking with other sources of ARMOUR PIERCING.
            * The Righteousness of the Emperor. Affected models have +1 DICE to Hit with ranged attacks that are made against targets within half the attack’s maximum range (this still applies only at half range even if the attack ignores Long Range).


Rally the Flock. During a campaign, keep a running total of your Flock points, beginning at 0. You earn Flock points in the following ways:
            * Defend the Holy Land. At the end of each battle, if there are no enemy models in your deployment zone, you earn 1 Flock.
            * Despise the Enemy. At the end of each battle, if you took at least half of the enemy models Out of Action, you earn 1 Flock.
            * Never Cease. At the end of each battle, if at all times during that battle you had at least one ORATOR model on the battlefield that was not Down, you earn 1 Flock.
            * Show Your Faith. The first time one of your Elite models, or your Miraculist, scores a Glorious Deed during each battle, you earn 1 Flock.
            * Spread the Holy Word. The first time one of your ORATOR models ends a Turn in the enemy deployment zone while it is not Down, you earn 1 Flock.


Spending Flock Points
You can spend your Flock points in the following ways:
            * Gather. When recruiting Mercenaries, you can spend Flock Points to reduce the Glory cost by 1 for every 5 Flock you spend.
            * Pray. When one of your Elite models would roll on the Elite Trauma table, you can spend 2 Flock to roll twice and choose one of the results. You must choose to do this before rolling.
            * Replace. When one of your non-Elite, non-Mercenary models becomes a casualty, you can spend 1 Flock to replace that model for free. You still lose any of its battlekit.
            * Sacrifice. When you Explore, you can spend 3 Flock to gain the Lucky Exploration Skill during that exploration.
            * Seek. When you Explore, you can spend 2 Flock to gain the Seek Exploration Skill during that exploration.
Adeptus Ministorum Patrons
Your patron can be the Ecclesiastic Cardinal or Lord Inquisitor Shared Patron.

Adeptus Ministorum Unique Battlekit
Adeptus Ministorum Weapons
            * Brazier of Holy Fire. HELD, FIRE, +1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword
            * Strike: Melee, MAIN HAND ONLY
            * Unleash: 12”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR. This attack can be made only once per battle.
            * Dartmask. 6”, IGNORE LONG RANGE, GAS, ASSAULT, THROWN
            * Incentiviser. Melee, CUMBERSOME, STUN, TWO-HANDED. As an Action with no roll required, the wielder can grant one ally within 1” of it +1 DICE to Dash Success Rolls during that ally’s next Activation, or this Activation if the wielder and that ally are activating as a FIRETEAM.
            * Mace of Censure. Melee, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, STUN
            * Null Skull. Melee, +1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, the carrier gains FEAR and can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 1.
            * Zealot’s Vindictor. TWO-HANDED, HELD
            * Chain Blade: Melee, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, CUMBERSOME
            * Torch: 8”, ASSAULT, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE
Adeptus Ministorum Equipment
            * Reliquarius. HELD. While the carrier is not Down, Injury rolls against the carrier and allies within 4” of it have -1 DICE.
            * Sanctification Orbs. The equipped model’s attacks with FIRE have +1 INJURY DICE if the target is within 8”. Cannot be carried along with any THROWN weapon.
Adeptus Ministorum Campaign Shop
During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.
            * Blade of Admonition (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Melee Weapon). Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2. The equipped model gains the FEAR Keyword. This Keyword cannot be ignored by any Chaos model, even if that model itself has FEAR.
            * Book of St. Lucius (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Orator Only, Equipment). Friendly models benefit from Battle Hymns while within 12” of the equipped model rather than 6”.
            * Brazier of Eternal Flame (7 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Combined Weapon). FIRE, TWO-HANDED
            * Strike: Melee, +1 INJURY DICE
            * Torch: 10”, -1 INJURY DICE, AUTOMATIC 2, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR
            * Castigator (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Ranged Weapon). 12”, PISTOL, VICIOUS 11, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL, Scope Capable. Injuries caused by this weapon cannot be modified by -DICE.
            * Cloak of St. Aspira (6 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Armour). -2 to Injury rolls, IMPERVIOUS
            * Desvalle’s Holy Circle (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Equipment). The wearer treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword), and all Injury rolls against the wearer have -1 INJURY DICE.
            * Font of Fury (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Ranged Weapon). 8”, +1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT, BLAST 3”, GAS, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, IGNORE ARMOUR, THROWN, FUMBLE, additional +1 INJURY DICE against models with the DAEMON Keyword. Can be used only once per battle.
            * Icon of Sanctity (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Equipment). HELD, ICON. While the carrier is not Down, enemies within 6” of it treat all of your models as if they had the FEAR Keyword, and your models within 6” have NEGATE FEAR.
            * Mace of Valaan (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Confessor Only, Combined Weapon).
            * Strike: Melee, +1 DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, MAIN HAND ONLY
            * Smite: 12”, IGNORE LINE OF SIGHT, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE
            * Sigil Ecclesiasticus (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Orator Only, Equipment). As an Action that requires no roll, the equipped model can choose a Battle Hymn. That Hymn becomes the Hymn being spoken by all of your ORATOR models for the remainder of the Turn, instead of the one you chose at the start of the Turn.

Adeptus Ministorum Mercenaries

Assassinorum Mercenaries
Max 1 per Warband:
            * 0-1 Adamus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)
            * 0-1 Callidus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)
            * 0-1 Culexus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)
            * 0-1 Eversor Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)

Warband Variant: Ecclesiastic Militant Force  
            * Sororitas Support. You can recruit up to 1 Dogmata or 1 Palatine, up to 4 Battle Sisters (max 1 Retributor, 1 Sacrosant, and 1 Zephyrim or Seraphim), and up to 3 Repentia from the Adepta Sororitas Faction. You can also recruit up to 1 Penitent Engine, but you cannot recruit both a Penitent Engine and a Miraculist.


If a piece of battlekit appears in the Adeptus Ministorum Armoury as well as the Adepta Sororitas Armoury, you must obey the highest LIMIT between those Armouries. Models can still only be equipped from their own Armoury unless otherwise stated. You can also purchase Campaign Shop battlekit from the Adepta Sororitas Faction, which can be used by models from that Faction.
            * Dogmatic Hymns. Your Dogmata models count as having the ORATOR Keyword. When such a model succeeds when using its Hand of the Emperor, give one friendly MINISTORUM or SORORITAS model within 6” of it that it can see 1 BLESSING MARKER instead of gaining a Miracle.
            * Fervor. Your Battle Hymns special rule applies to your SORORITAS models. Once during each of their Activations, your Palatine models’ Rapturous Blows Ability can be treated as if you discard a Miracle so long as the Palatine is within 6” of a friendly ORATOR model, or within 9” of a friendly Dialogus.
            * Decree Passive. You cannot recruit any Crusaders, Death Cult Assassins, or Drill Abbots.
Astra Militarum
Astra Militarum
  

Astra Militarum Special Rules
Voice of Command. As an Action with a Success Roll with +1 DICE, any of your Elite models can issue an Order to one other non-Elite MILITARUM model within 6” of it. On a success, the chosen model gains the benefits of that Order until the end of the current Turn. A model cannot benefit from the same order more than Once at a time, but can be given multiple different Orders.
            * Duty and Honour! The affected model has +1 INJURY DICE with melee attacks.
            * First Rank, Fire! Second Rank, Fire! The affected model must only spend 3 BLOOD MARKERS to Bloodbath an enemy with a ranged attack, whether the target is Down or not.
            * Fix Bayonets! When an enemy Charges the affected model, the affected model can make a single melee attack against the Charging model.
            * Move! Move! Move! The affected model has +2” movement speed and +1 DICE to all Climb, Dash, Jump, and Diving Charge Success Rolls.
            * Take Aim! The affected model has +1 DICE to Hit with ranged attacks and ignores Long Range penalties.
            * Take Cover! Injury rolls against the affected model have -1 flat, or -2 flat instead if the model is benefiting from cover or a defended obstacle during an attack. This does not count as Armour, but stacks with Armour only up to a total of -3.


Commendations. During a campaign, after each battle, after rolling for casualties and Elite Trauma, you can choose one of the following Commendations for one of your models to receive. It permanently gains the benefits of that Commendation. It must meet all of that Commendations requirements. If none of your models qualify, then none of them gain a Commendation. A model can gain any number of Commendations, but only one of each.
            * Bastion Honour (non-Elite, non-Ogryn Only)
            * Requirements: The model took at least 2 enemies Out of Action with melee attacks during this battle.
            * Benefit: Once per battle, when an enemy successfully Charges this model, this model can immediately make a melee attack against that enemy.
            * Celeris Heart
            * Requirements: The model retreated from melee at least twice this battle.
            * Benefit: The model gains the SKIRMISHER Keyword.
            * Decoration of Duty (Elite Only)
            * Requirements: The model was deployed in at least 8 consecutive battles, including this one, as an Elite.
            * Benefit: The model gains an additional 2 XP immediately.
            * Decree of Dispensation (Leader Only, can be taken only once)
            * Requirements: You have lost at least three battles, including this battle.
            * Benefit: This model gains the Extra Dice and Reroll Exploration Skills.
            * Honourifica Imperialis (Elite Only)
            * Requirements: The model has at least 5 other Commendations and scored a Glorious Deed during this battle.
            * Benefit: You immediately earn 3 Glory.
            * Laurels of Purity (non-Psyker Only)
            * Requirements: The model was affected by at least 2 enemy Psychic Actions during this battle, and was not taken Out of Action.
            * Benefit: The model can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 1.
            * Lord Commander’s Sigilum (Elite Only)
            * Requirements: The model took at least 3 enemies Out of Action during this battle.
            * Benefit: At the end of each future battle, this model earns 1 additional XP if it took at least 3 enemies Out of Action during that battle.
            * Medallion Resolute
            * Requirements: The model was on the battlefield when you succeeded on a Morale test during this battle.
            * Benefit: While Down, the model does not count as Down for the purposes of Morale.
            * Medal of Laudable Service (non-Elite Only)
            * Requirements: The model has been deployed in at least 6 consecutive battles, including this one.
            * Benefit: The model is immediately promoted to Elite, in addition to any other promotions you make.
            * Merit of the Strategium
            * Requirements: The model earned you VP during this battle in a way other than taking enemies Out of Action.
            * Benefit: After deployment, including Infiltrators, you can re-deploy this model in your deployment zone (if it has INFILTRATOR, it cannot use that Keyword during this re-deployment).
            * Oculus Laureate (Leader Only)
            * Requirements: The model has scored at least 5 Glorious Deeds, including at least 1 during this battle.
            * Benefit: At the end of each further battle, if this model was not taken Out of Action, you earn 1 Glory.
            * Order of the Adamantine Chain (Elite Only)
            * Requirements: During this battle, the model issued at least 3 Orders, took at least one enemy Out of Action, and was not taken Out of Action.
            * Benefit: The model gains an additional 1 XP immediately.
            * Recon Star
            * Requirements: The model ended this battle in the enemy’s deployment zone.
            * Benefit: This model gains your choice of either the Seek or Circle Back Exploration Skill.
            * Star of Fidelity (non-Elite Only)
            * Requirements: The model was issued an Order during every Turn of the battle.
            * Benefit: The model can be issued an order by one of your Elite models while it is within 24” instead of 6”.
            * Survivalist Commendation (non-Elite Only)
            * Requirements: The model succeeded on at least two casualty tests, including one at the end of this battle.
            * Benefit: You can reroll each casualty test the model makes once. If it is later promoted to Elite, you can reroll each Elite Trauma roll you make for it once.
Astra Militarum Patrons
Your patron can be a Lord General Militant, or the Administratum Prefectus, Indomitus Crusade, or Lord Inquisitor Shared Patron.
Patron: Lord General Militant
Or a similar Astra Militarum officer.
            * Artillerist (LIMIT: 1). Once per battle, as an Action that does not require a roll, this model can choose a point on the battlefield within 24” that it can see. Each model within 3” of that point that does not have any terrain directly above it must roll on the Injury chart.
            * Bellowing Voice. This model can issue Orders to allies within 18” instead of 6”..
            * Faithful Servant of the Throne. This model can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 2. If it is already a PSYKER, it instead has +1 DICE when Denying the Witch.
            * Iron Discipline. This model can suffer up to 2 additional Battle Scars before being killed.
            * Lead From The Front. During an Activation in which it Charged, this model has +1 DICE to Hit and +1 INJURY DICE with melee attacks.
            * Master Tactician (LIMIT: 1). After you activate this model, you decide the next 3 models to activate, following the normal limits (i.e. the second will usually be your own model again). If you choose a model in a Fireteam, the model's owner decides if it will activate as a Fireteam or individually.

Astra Militarum Unique Equipment
            * Regiment Flag. HELD, ICON. While the bearer is not Down, it and each of its allies within 8” of it have NEGATE FEAR.
            * Rough Rider Horse. The equipped model is mounted on a horse. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the BEAST Keyword, a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, and it is equipped with Steed’s Hooves, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Horsemaster ability.
            * Steed’s Hooves. Melee, +1 DICE. This weapon can be used alongside any other melee weapon when the rider takes the Fight Action, and does not suffer off-hand penalties.
            * Horsemaster. The rider has +1 DICE to all Dash, Climb, and Jump Success Rolls
Astra Militarum Campaign Shop
During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.
            * Clarion Proclamatus (2 Glory, LIMIT: 2, Elite Only, Equipment). The equipped model can issue Orders to allies up to 24” away.
            * Fire Of Judgement (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Ranged Weapon). 18”, PISTOL, +1 INJURY MODIFIER, -DICE cannot be applied to the Injury roll, RISKY
            * Laurels Of Command (3 Glory, Castellan Only, Equipment). The equipped model can issue two Orders during each of its Activations.
            * Medal Macharia (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Equipment). Once during each of its Activations, when the equipped model issues an Order, it can choose two Orders for the target to benefit from instead of one.
            * Moiraean Lance (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Ranged Weapon). 12”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, RISKY, PISTOL. When used to make a ranged attack, draw a straight line that is 1mm wide from the attacker to the target. On a hit, all models along that line, friendly or enemy, are hit.
            * Null Coat (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Non-Psyker Elite Only, Equipment). Injury rolls with the PSYCHIC or IGNORE ARMOUR Keyword have -1 INJURY DICE against the equipped model. In addition, it can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 1.
            * Refractor Field Generator (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Equipment). The equipped model treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).
            * Relic of Lost Cadia (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Castellan Only, Equipment). Once per battle, as an Action that requires no roll, the equipped model can display the relic. Until the end of the current Turn, the bearer and each of its MILITARUM allies within 12” of it that can see it have +1 DICE to Hit and CRITICAL with all attacks.
            * Skull Mask Of Acheron (1 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Equipment, Headgear). The equipped model gains the FEAR Keyword.
            * Star Of Terra (7 Glory, Castellan Only, Equipment). Injury rolls made against the equipped model have -1 INJURY DICE. In addition, the equipped model treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword). Finally, the first time the equipped model scores a Glorious Deed during each battle, you gain an additional 1 Glory.
Psykana Psychic Discipline
            * Nightshroud (5 credits, Effect). No Range, Self, Next Activation, the caster and any allies within 6” of it have the STEALTH Keyword.
            * Lightning Arc (3 credits, Attack). Melee, SWEEPING, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN.
            * Psychic Barrier (5 credits, Effect). No Range, Self, Next Activation, the caster and each friendly model within 3” of it treat Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).
            * Psychic Lash (5 credits, Attack). 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY
            * Soul Storm (10 credits, Attack). 24”, +1 INJURY DICE, BLAST 3”, IGNORE COVER, PSYCHIC, RISKY.
            * Telepathic Order (5 credits, Effect). 18”, One Ally, Immediate, choose one Order and issue it to the target.

Battlekit
The Castellan can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Astra Militarum Armoury.


Abilities
            * Bring it Down! As an Action with a Risky Success Roll with +1 DICE, the Castellan can choose one other friendly non-Mercenary MILITARUM model within 6” of it. On a success, that model can immediately make an attack with a non-HEAVY weapon.
            * Get Back in the Fight! As an Action that does not require a roll, one ally within 6” of the Castellan that is Down can stand up.
